programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan investigates the death of a popular country singer murdered in his dressing room minutes before he was due to make an acceptance speech. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke and Victoria Rowell(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan discovers a manipulative killer posing as a psychiatrist, who uses hypnotism to lure his victims to their deaths(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An aggressive female pharmaceuticals representative stalks the hospital's new chief of staff, hoping to break up his marriage and have him all to herself - and it is not long before Dr Sloan has another murder investigation on his hands(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark tries to clear a surfer suspected of murdering his girlfriend's brother, a member of a loutish street gang. Dick Van Dyke stars(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan investigates the case of his old friend Kent Morrissey, who mysteriously dropped dead while carrying out an operation. Guest starring Jack Klugman(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: US Navy captain Jake Marsden is murdered in his hotel room and inquiries lead to marine lieutenant Emma Reynolds - who tells the team she was the intended target. After being stationed in Kabul, she became pregnant by a local man called Amir who was later killed in action - and Abby discovers he was the sole male heir of a wealthy family that owns a large tract of land in a politically sensitive part of Afghanistan(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a Navy commander last seen in the company of a mysterious blonde woman, who turns out to be missing NCIS agent and Tony's ex-lover EJ Barrett. She identifies the murderer as Seal-turned-assassin Marcellus Dane, who is suspected of working for Casey Stratton - a member of black ops unit Phantom Eight. Guest starring Sarah Jane Morris(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An estate agent and two clients discover the body of Lt Com Maya Burris, a naval attache who had been working in Egypt, and her detective husband Nick arrives on the scene to demand answers. Using documents discovered on the victim's boat, Abby links her to Barry Norton, who is suspected of having sold government secrets to a Middle Eastern terrorist group known as the SRC(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs goes into his favourite diner for a cup of coffee and finds himself staring down the barrel of a gun, forcing him to question choices he has made in the past and present. The action then flashes back a few days to when he and the rest of the team members were investigating the death of a petty officer on board USS Gentry, which has been undergoing repairs in dry dock. The 200th episode of the crime drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy captain wearing a colourful costume underneath his uniform is shot and killed in a flower shop, and further investigation reveals he was leading a double life as a masked vigilante. Vance brings in Tony's ex-fiancee, journalist Wendy Miller, who claims the victim had been trying to expose a scandal, and as the team pursues the case, a real-estate scam is uncovered. Guest starring Perrey Reeves (Entourage)(n)

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm poses as a lowly gunnery sergeant to help Mac investigate questionable marine training methods, and discovers an overzealous officer is using unorthodox and highly dangerous tactics to teach his men to react quickly during combat(n)

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend a homeless former Navy Seal accused of killing three men who tried to rob a shop. Drama, starring David James Elliott(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team is assigned to a joint terrorism task force by the Secretary when a Moscow-born scientist who it is believed may have been targeted by the Russians for selling state secrets, is found dead. The trail appears to lead to a friend of Sofia's, another scientist who worked for Russia and who may have succumbed to professional jealousy. However, when she too is found dead, the team discovers the hallmarks of Sergei Mishnev, the terrorist who nearly killed Gibbs. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While on a joint Coast Guard and NCIS training exercise at sea with Agent Borin, Gibbs spots a dead man overboard, who is found to be a missing member of the crew of a nearby vessel. However, when the agent boards the ship for questioning, he realises it has been commandeered by pirates. Naval drama, starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Navy commander's wife, determining whether it is linked to her role as a therapist, or an act of terrorism since her husband's name has appeared on a Jihadist's target list. Elsewhere, the group discusses Halloween costumes, as well as Tony's recent dating habits. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers a fraudulent charity that preys on those searching for missing military personnel while investigating the murder of a retired Master Sergeant. Meanwhile, Bishop agonises over the results of her probation evaluation, and Tony contemplates adopting a stray cat that followed him home. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the cause of a hit-and-run incident in which a Petty Officer has been killed. Meanwhile, Gibbs works to clear a Navy Hospital Corpsman who has been indicted for illegally providing medical aid to victims of the crash, despite the injured insisting her techniques helped save their lives. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: During a training exercise in Zimbabwe, Dempsey decides to make an unofficial visit to his cousin's farm. With the rest of Red Troop in tow, they discover his family are harbouring a rebel leader who wants the SAS's help. However, the area is quickly surrounded by the violent Five Brigade, and as the bullets begin to fly, Henno and his team are forced to escape via a crocodile-infested river - with the gun-toting soldiers hot on their heels. Ross Kemp and Heather Peace star(n)

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a former actress kills her ex-boyfriend, Hoss takes the blame. The deceased is the son of a senator, who vows to take down the Cartwrights as revenge for the death(n)

programme.desc: Billy frees a white girl from the Apaches, only to be taken hostage himself(n)

programme.desc: The IMF team infiltrate a replica of an American town used to help train spies in the Eastern Bloc to blend into Western society. However, they discover espionage is the least of their worries and are soon working to prevent the release of a deadly virus. Star Trek's George Takei guest stars(n)

Crime drama, with David Caruso, Emily Procter and Adam Rodriguez(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy reservist is found dead in his home with marks around his neck, and Gibbs and the team discover he was working on a highly classified case for the department of defence. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An enigmatic killer shoots dead a businessman spending Thanksgiving at a hotel in the city, then takes his glasses, jewellery and ID to Washington Dulles airport, which has been brought to a stand-still by a massive snowstorm. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherley(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee deals with his father's recent death by writing him a letter outlining the details of his latest investigation. The case involved tracking down a hactivist collective known as Krampus, who were thought to have been responsible for an incident in which the internet crashed all over Washington, DC. McGee and Abby brought in three known cyber-terrorists for questioning, and discover evidence that links the trio to an attempted breach of the Congress e-mail server and archive. However, when this line of inquiry reaches a dead-end, the team picks up a new lead that suggests an isolated hacker from Wisconsin may be responsible. This 'lone wolf' scenario does not seem plausible to McGee, though, as he recalls a lesson his late father taught him. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Still working undercover, Kerry gets in way over her head after witnessing the death of a Radford escort girl and being ordered to give one of the others a beating, and Rob begins to fear the worst when she goes for days without reporting back. As Neil's relationship with Andrea blossoms, he lets slip some of his most closely guarded secrets about his colleagues - not least big cheese Adam Okaro - which soon end up on the front pages of the newspapers. programme.title: The Bill

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Although she and Dale are rescued from the Radfords' murderous clutches, Kerry's problems are just beginning as Gina gets wind of her undercover mission and vows to end her career in the force. A heated argument between Adam and Rob ends with the latter being issued a formal warning, and Sam fears the worst when her teenage daughter Abi goes missing. programme.title: Where the Heart Is

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Intrigue and frustration are the order of the day as Anna and Karen come to terms with the possibility that a patient may be suffering domestic abuse. programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: The Skelthwaite Scorpions hop across the Channel for a match with their twin-town team. The competition doesn't take up all their time, however, as Vic finds his uncle's war grave. Simon, meanwhile, has a rendezvous with a local businesswoman and Chris falls for a hiker(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Julienne receives an SOS from Holloway Prison, whose usual maternity workers have been struck down by illness, and when she and Trixie step in to help, the nun puts her reputation on the line to prevent a heavily pregnant convict having her unborn baby taken away by social services. Shelagh faces heartache when a routine pregnancy check reveals something far more serious, Alec has a confession for Jenny, and Fred takes the gang to the theatre to celebrate Chummy's birthday - only for the trip to end in disaster. Lacey Turner, best known as EastEnders' Stacey Branning, guest stars(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Jenny has an eventful few days, starting with a patient who as well as having herself to worry about, is also struggling to cope with her mother, an agoraphobic who hasn't been outside for at least 12 years. On top of that, Alec asks the midwife to accompany him to Brighton for the weekend, leaving her wondering if his intentions are strictly honourable. However, things soon take a tragic turn. Meanwhile, Shelagh joins the local choir to take her mind off her problems. Jessica Raine, Leo Staar and Laura Main star(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives are busy preparing for Sister Evangelina's surprise jubilee celebrations, marking 50 years since she took her vows, but a face from the past threatens to ruin the party for the guest of honour. It's back to business when a young woman with Down's syndrome is brought in feeling unwell. To everyone's surprise, they discover she is six months pregnant, causing some of them to think the worst, and the staff are joined by new nurse Patsy, whose sense of humour and no-nonsense attitude make her an instant hit(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie is chuffed when local curate Tom invites her to join him for a day of cricket, sending her to work with a spring in her step. Is love on the cards for the young midwife? Shelagh's infertility has made her think long and hard about what she wants in life, so she approaches her husband with an idea, while Patsy upsets a young mother in the clinic and is moved to the district rota, where she works tirelessly to diagnose a docker's unusual symptoms(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise

As DI Goodman and the team try to deduce how she could have been poisoned without their boss noticing any foul play, they find themselves entering the murky world of island politics, where blackmail, threats and corruption seem commonplace - fuelled by ongoing tension between the French and British. Meanwhile, Humphrey braves the world of online dating, under the guidance of ladies' man Dwayne - and soon finds his perfect match. Lucy Cohu and Nigel Lindsay guest star(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: The murder of Amir Aziz, a prominent anti-fundamentalist Muslim, drags the Lyell team into the murky world of hate-crime and counter-terrorism. Initially thought to be the work of a EDL member whose son was killed by the Taliban, the team begin to suspect the killing is connected to Sarah Begovic, a young woman who left the UK to relocate to Syria, but who recently returned home in secret with her six-month-old son. Feature-length episode of the crime drama, starring Richard Lintern(n)

programme.title: The White Princess

Shelagh finds she is at the surgery almost as much as she is at home, so the Turners come up with a solution which, for 1960, proves somewhat ground-breaking(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Poplar is gripped by an outbreak of dysentery, but that's the least of mum-to-be Marie Amos's worries when her husband Tony is arrested for gross indecency in the gentlemen's toilets and faces a criminal hearing. Nurse Crane meets Dolores McEvoy, a pregnant Irish woman who is clearly malnourished - but when she visits the woman's home, it turns out she has given a false address and has disappeared. Trixie is delighted when Tom asks her to oversee her first official church duty since their engagement, while at Nonnatus House, Fred tackles a rat infestation - only for Sister Monica Joan to work against him. programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Winifred's eyes are opened to Poplar's seedy underworld when she cares for expectant prostitute Bridget Cole. Horrified by the young woman's lack of awareness, she draws on her teaching experience, and with help from Sgt Noakes sets out to promote safe sex to all local working girls. Barbara struggles to understand why expectant father Frank Robbins would pressure his wife to bear him a son, while Sister Monica Joan is feeling sidelined - until she finds herself unexpectedly assisting Shelagh with an emergency birth. Trixie invites herself along to a meeting between Tom and the Bishop - but things get tense when the idea of the couple moving to Newcastle is raised(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A Christian Scientist couple refuse medicine for their newborn baby, leaving Sister Julienne questioning the nature of absolute faith. However, the case becomes more complicated when the parents are accused of harming their child. Barbara uses her initiative to communicate with a pregnant Sylheti woman who cannot speak English, although using the patient's young son to translate provides new problems. Sister Mary Cynthia returns to Nonnatus House and a woman catches handyman Fred's eye(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A diabetic teenager faces a tough time after falling pregnant, a situation complicated by her boyfriend's criminal past. programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Manchester City v Leicester City at the Etihad Stadium and Everton v Arsenal at Goodison Park. Last season's corresponding fixture between the Citizens and Foxes was a pivotal one in terms of the title race. Long-serving City captain Vincent Kompany's wonder-goal was the difference between the sides, and meant Pep Guardiola's men only needed one more victory to clinch the title, which they duly accomplished a few days later. Plus, action from Aston Villa v Southampton at Villa Park, Bournemouth v Burnley at the Vitality Stadium, Brighton & Hove Albion v Sheffield United at the Amex Stadium, Newcastle United v Crystal Palace at St James' Park, and Norwich City v Wolverhampton Wanderers at Carrow Road(n)

programme.title: Britain's Christmas Story
programme.desc: Gareth Malone and Karen Gibson conclude their special series for Advent exploring Britain's Christmas traditions, unwrapping how the season has been celebrated across the centuries. They discover why a ban on Christmas led to rioting in the streets, and how the festivities were revived with a vengeance in Victorian times. As they trace the stories behind now-common traditions - and take part in less familiar ones such as pub carolling - the Archbishop of Canterbury explains how he celebrates Christmas, and why its meaning remains so relevant today(n)

programme.title: Home (2015)
programme.desc: An alien on the run from his own people arrives on Earth and embarks on an adventure with a daring young woman. It turns out to be a life-changing trip during which they begin to understand the true meaning of the word home. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Jim Parsons, Rihanna, Steve Martin and Jennifer Lopez(n)

programme.title: Snow Bears
programme.desc: Documentary following polar bears as they travel 400 miles to reach the North Pole. As spring sets in, bears and their cubs must travel north to reach the pack ice, where they will hunt seals. Their journey leads to encounters with all manner of other Arctic wildlife, including reindeer, narwhals, walrus and arctic foxes. Narrated by Kate Winslet(n)

programme.title: Hold the Sunset
programme.desc: Edith and her family celebrate their last Christmas together before she and Phil set off for their dream retirement in the Mediterranean. However, things do not go to plan as Edith's son Roger decides to invite her scurrilous one-time flame Bob to join in with the festivities, and Edith's sister Joan makes it clear to all that she will not be watching the Queen's Speech anywhere else. Meanwhile, Queenie locks Sandra and Wendy into a wardrobe, and Phil finds himself talking to a ghost. Christmas special from 2018, guest starring Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones celebrates Christmas with carols from the Assembly Hall in Belfast, including Hark The Herald, and O Little Town Of Bethlehem. With guests Katherine Jenkins, G4, Alexis Ffrench and The Lion King star Shaun Escoffery(n)

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy doll's status as his owner's favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney(n)

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar (2014)
programme.desc: Heroic flightless birds Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico uncover a plot to take over the world. Needing help to foil the evil scheme, they seek out a secret society of animal agents, led by a heroic wolf. Animated comedy spin-off, with the voices of Benedict Cumberbatch, John Malkovich and Tom McGrath(n)

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and the team visit Tyntesfield in North Somerset - a stately pile that celebrates Christmas in high Victorian style. John meets the staff getting the place spruced up, and he gets measured up for his own period outfit. Anita Rani tries her hand at making eco Christmas cards, Steve Brown creates decorations based on Victorian originals, while Ellie Harrison discovers the estate's veteran trees and learns about the novel way they are protected from livestock(n)

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: As the Magisterium closes in, Lyra learns more about Asriel's rebellion, but her assistance to him comes at great personal cost. The adaptation of Philip Pullman's fantasy adventure novel series reaches its conclusion. Starring Dafne Keen, Ruth Wilson, James McAvoy and Gary Lewis(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: In 1843, miserly businessman Scrooge is visited by a ghost from the past on a freezing Christmas Eve and is forced to face the impact of his self-interested, penny-pinching behaviour on his own life and those around him. Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight's adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce, Andy Serkis and Stephen Graham(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by studio guests to review the day's Premier League action(n)

programme.title: Women's World Cup 2019 Review
programme.desc: A look back at the tournament from France, which saw USA enter as the holders and England look for a strong showing under Phil Neville(n)

programme.title: Doddie Weir: One More Try
programme.desc: In 2016, Scottish rugby star Doddie Weir was diagnosed with motor neurone disease. Doctors said he would be in a wheelchair within a year, but instead Doddie has battled the disease and is on a mission to help find a cure. Fellow player John Beattie has followed Doddie and his family over the past two years, gaining a unique insight into the life and mission of the man behind the famous tartan suit(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: The Croods (2013)
programme.desc: Prehistoric family the Croods find themselves with nowhere to live when their cave is destroyed. They embark on a dangerous trek through an unstable landscape overrun with all manner of dangerous predators in search of a new home, but their domestic squabbles prove as much of an obstacle as the wildlife. Animated comedy, with the voices of Nicolas Cage and Ryan Reynolds(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda (2008)
programme.desc: A hero is needed to defend a peaceful valley community from attack by a rampaging snow leopard. The unlikely candidate for the job is a lazy panda, who enlists the aid of a legendary team of animal fighters and their wise master to teach him the martial arts skills he needs to fulfil his destiny. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jack Black, Dustin Hoffman, Angelina Jolie, Ian McShane and Jackie Chan(n)

programme.title: Donkey's Caroling Christmas-tacular
programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz(n)

programme.title: A Berry Royal Christmas
programme.desc: This one-off programme offers a unique look into charities that the Duke and Duchess of Cambridge support, as they invite Mary Berry to accompany them on four special visits. Mary also prepares a feast for a Christmas party hosted by the royal couple for the volunteers and gets help preparing the dishes from special guests including former Bake Off winner Nadiya Hussain - and the Duke and Duchess themselves. Throughout the programme Mary also cooks some of her favourite Christmas recipes for viewers to try out at home(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 2 (1999)
programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. However, Woody becomes tempted to spend his life languishing in the safety of a museum rather than face the prospect of his owner growing up. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Brave (2012)
programme.desc: A princess defies her mother's plans to secure peace by marrying her off to the son of one of their allies. A witch provides the rebellious royal with a magic spell to change her fate, but the enchantment backfires disastrously when the queen is transformed into a bear. Pixar's animated fantasy, with the voices of Kelly Macdonald, Emma Thompson and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Nick Park's Bafta-winning film which introduced the animated inventor and his faithful canine sidekick to the world. Wallace is distraught when his cheese supplies run out, so he decides to take a trip to the moon. All he needs to do is build himself a rocket. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Billionaire Boy
programme.desc: Family comedy, by David Walliams and Kevin Cecil. Len Spud and his 12-year-old son Joe become billionaires when Len invents a new toilet roll. Len soon starts dating fortysomething hand model Sapphire Diamond, while the butler helps a neglected and unhappy Joe transfer to the local comprehensive where he conceals the facts of his wealth. However, when Len turns up at the school with his son's forgotten homework, the cat is soon out of the bag. John Thomson stars as the inventor, alongside Walliams, Catherine Tate and Rebecca Front, and featuring Warwick Davis and Bryn Terfel as themselves(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Sue Barker hosts a festive edition of the quiz, with double Olympic swimming gold medallist Rebecca Adlington, former World Superbike champion James Toseland, ex-footballer Darren Bent and 2010 Winter Olympics skeleton gold medallist Amy Williams joining team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell. All the questions over the course of the show have a Christmas theme and there is even a guest appearance by Father Christmas, who poses his own seasonal teaser to the teams(n)

programme.title: The Goes Wrong Show
programme.desc: The first of six 30-minute plays featuring the Cornley Polytechnic Drama Society sees the cast taking on an overly ambitious endeavour - the story of Santa and his elves trying to bring festive happiness to a sad little girl. However, an already surly Santa indulges in too much Christmas sherry and contrives to ruin everything. Crackers explode, an elf is trapped for the duration of the show and the toy machine tries to eat the snowman. Prolific actor Robert Grove, screen-hogging Sandra Wilkinson and artistically mistrusted Dennis Tyde struggle to contain the chaos. Comedy about an amateur dramatics group, starring Henry Lewis, Jonathan Sayer and Henry Shields(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda promises to cut back drinking in the new year, so Mick, pleased his wife is making an effort, reveals he has a Christmas surprise lined up. Keanu and Sharon remain oblivious that Phil is quizzing people who could help confirm his suspicions, while Bex tries to confront Martin about his behaviour(n)

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to put the magic back into the festive season by practising a few conjuring tricks - but things do not always go according to plan and people keep disappearing. Eric and Cyril aim to persuade their wives to try Arkwrights' special French custard, while Mrs Rossi invites Mr Newbold round for Christmas lunch. What will the Black Widow have to say when she finds out? Comedy, starring David Jason, Johnny Vegas, Kulvinder Ghir, Geoffrey Whitehead, Sue Holderness and Stephanie Cole(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: As warned by Marley, when midnight strikes, Scrooge is visited by the Spirit of Christmas Past. The spectre takes the miser on a journey that exposes his darkest childhood memories, his cut-throat business manner, his isolation and his manipulation of those around him, including the Cratchits. Adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce(n)

programme.title: King Gary
programme.desc: Comedy pilot about a working-class couple's aspirations to achieve social acceptance and moderate material success in competitive suburbia. Gary plans to throw the biggest barbecue in history to win over the rest of the neighbourhood - only to discover someone else is planning to hold one of their own on the same day. Meanwhile, Terri makes a disastrous attempt at 'micro-blading'. Starring Tom Davis and Laura Checkley, with Simon Day, Camille Coduri and Romesh Ranganathan(n)

programme.title: Famalam
programme.desc: Highlights from the comedy sketch show, including an overprotective boyfriend meeting his match, and Scribbler P giving an important lesson on military history. Plus, the competitive aunties cause havoc, Midsomer receives an injection of diversity as Detective Mountree solves a whodunit in a stately home and Fantastic Egusi Films give their inimitable rendition of a Hollywood blockbuster. Starring Vivienne Acheampong, Gbemisola Ikumelo, Samson Kayo, John Macmillan, Tom Moutchi and Akemnji Ndifornyen(n)

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Black Mirror creator Charlie Brooker hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with broadcaster Emma Barnett and comedian Phil Wang joining captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's events(n)

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Taking a place on Graham's festive sofa, from the new blockbuster Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker are John Boyega and Daisy Ridley, alongside Superman himself, Henry Cavill, who is appearing in new Netflix fantasy drama series The Witcher. Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon, reunited for the much-anticipated Gavin & Stacey Christmas special, also appear. Plus, Robbie Williams performs a song from his new album The Christmas Present, and more intrepid audience members willing to recount an anecdote from the dreaded red chair try their luck(n)

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Robbie Williams surprises some karaoke-singing members of the audience with special renditions of his classic hits in Robbie-oke, and gives a performance of Winter Wonderland. Plus, Ian Wright hands over his phone for Send To All, and three young brothers get the surprise of their lives when they take part in an Escape Room, but find themselves on stage at the London Palladium to become the Unexpected Stars of the Show(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Naga Munchetty and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: CBeebies Hansel & Gretel
programme.desc: The stars of CBeebies bring the story of Hansel and Gretel to life, with a vibrant 1980s twist, and a number of classic pop hits from the decade. Featuring Cat Sandion and Molly and Mack's Joshua Haynes as the intrepid youngsters, alongside Andy Day, Maddie Moate and Waffle the Wonder Dog, making his CBeebies panto debut(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book. It tells the tale of a little mouse who takes a walk through the woods in search of a nut, only to encounter a fox, an owl and a snake who all want to eat him. To escape their clutches, the quick-witted rodent creates an imaginary monster to scare away his attackers - but it turns out to be all too real. Robbie Coltrane heads the voice cast as the Gruffalo, with James Corden as the Mouse and Rob Brydon, John Hurt and Tom Wilkinson as the predators(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo's Child
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of the sequel to Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book, reuniting all the voice cast from the original. The Gruffalo has raised his daughter on tales of the big, bad mouse, the only creature in the forest he is frightened of. Despite her father's warnings, she sets off in search of this scary creature, along the way encountering the snake, owl and the fox. But when she still has no luck finding the evil rodent, she begins to think he does not exist after all. Robbie Coltrane, James Corden and Rob Brydon lend their voices, with Shirley Henderson as Gruffalo Jr(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3 (2016)
programme.desc: The clumsy hero is reunited with his long-lost father, whose help he will need when a supernatural foe threatens all of China. Father and son travel to a secret village populated by other pandas, and must train them in martial arts so they can defend their home. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black, Bryan Cranston, Angelina Jolie and Dustin Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble spend Christmas with the animals. Two Siberian tiger cubs take their first steps into the park - and have their first encounter with cars. Elsewhere, the staff at the house face their biggest challenge of the year - finding a tree on the estate that is just the right size for the stately home, chop it down, and get it inside without causing any damage. Plus, Jean Johansson mucks in with the keepers to hand out Christmas treats to their much-loved creatures(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty(n)

programme.title: Frozen (2013)
programme.desc: A princess with the power to freeze anything she touches loses control of her abilities and plunges the kingdom into a perpetual winter. She goes into hiding, but her sister remains determined that she can be saved from her own magic and sets off on a quest to find her, aided by a mountain man and a living snowman. Disney animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Kristen Bell and Idina Menzel(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Wrong Trousers
programme.desc: Nick Park's Oscar-winning animation featuring the bumbling inventor and his faithful dog, whose lives are turned upside down after foolishly offering board and lodgings to villainous penguin Feathers McGraw. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast (2017)
programme.desc: A prince is transformed into a hideous monster as punishment for his selfishness, and can only regain his human form by finding true love. Salvation comes in the form of a spirited young inventor, who offers to take her father's place when he is imprisoned in the monster's castle. But as romance blossoms between the unlikely pair, a jealous rival suitor only sees a beast to be slain. Live action remake of the Disney animated fairytale, starring Emma Watson, Dan Stevens and Luke Evans, with Ewan McGregor, Emma Thompson and Ian McKellen playing the Beast's entourage of living ornaments(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The Beales and Mitchells gather to celebrate Keanu and Louise's return to the Square - but unbeknown to everyone, all hell is about to break loose. A mix-up over what to wear on a night out embarrasses Linda and she ends up drowning her sorrows in the middle of the Square - unaware her Christmas surprise has arrived in the shape of prodigal son Lee. Martin is filled with panic after the previous night's incident, leaving Bex and Sonia concerned for his welfare, and Denise is determined to prove Sheree is not all she says she is(n)

programme.title: Take Off with Bradley and Holly
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and Holly Willoughby present a special Christmas family entertainment show, which offers members of the audience the chance to win the holiday of a lifetime to Lapland. The show will also feature special games, surprises and appearances by celebrity guests(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Scrooge is confronted with another spirit, which has assumed a familiar form drawn from his own tortured past. He witnesses the present day, and the seemingly happy Christmas enjoyed by the Cratchit family - but also learns there are cracks beneath the surface which he is responsible for making. The final ghost arrives to give Scrooge a glimpse of what the future holds - and a tragedy that will force him to confront the consequences of his misdeeds(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitably festive way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star(n)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers(n)

programme.title: Midnight Mass - BBC
programme.desc: Live Christmas Eve service from Croydon Minster, led by Revd Dr Andrew Bishop. The preacher is the Bishop of Croydon, the Rt Revd Jonathan Clark. The choir, directed by Ronny Krippner, sing Mozart's Great Credo Mass in C and lead the congregation in a number of well-loved carols, including It Came Upon a Midnight Clear and Hark! The Herald Angels Sing, accompanied by organist Tom Little(n)

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two(n)

programme.title: The Instant Gardener
programme.desc: Presenter Helen Skelton and expert garden designer Danny Clarke head to Bradford to breathe new life into a thoroughly overgrown garden lost in time. The aim is that they will get the job completed in just one day for owner Beverley and her family(n)

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: New entrant crofting couple Lynn and Sandra send their first pigs to slaughter. Raymond's best bull Major is injured in a brawl. The Rodgers hopes of Balmoral show hang on a clear TB test and buffalo farmer Stevie goes shopping in Holland(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker, Margherita Taylor and Steve Brown are in Buckinghamshire, where Matt is with a group of schoolchildren making their very first visit to a farm. Margherita meets the people working hard to preserve some of the UK's last box trees and finds out what's at stake for those that use it to make fine woodwind instruments, while Steve heads to Tiggywinkles wildlife hospital, where he helps return a couple of barn owls to the wild(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: The search for a chef to be crowned MasterChef: Professionals champion 2019 is almost over, as the three finalists face one last challenge. They are given three hours to cook a starter, a main course and a dessert, each of which takes their culinary abilities to a whole new level, with flawless presentation and exciting flavours. Judges Marcus Wareing, Monica Galetti and Gregg Wallace assess their efforts, before deciding the winner(n)

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Highlights from throughout the series, offering viewers a chance to revisit some of their favourite moments from previous years in the kitchen. Presented by Matt Tebbutt(n)

programme.title: The Sweet Makers
programme.desc: From candy canes and sugar mice to yule logs and chocolate coins, sweet treats are an integral part of Christmas celebrations. Guided by food historian Dr Annie Gray and social historian Emma Dabiri, four modern confectioners uncover the mystery of what a sugarplum is before decorating a series of exquisite Twelfth Cakes, affordable only to Georgian's wealthy elite. As they move into the Victorian era, they encounter the gulf between rich and poor - from Queen Victoria's favoured Boar's Head cake to jelly pistols and sugar mice accessible to children with just a few pennies to spend(n)

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: Sylvia Syms narrates a history of Westerns, featuring archive interviews with stars including Gary Cooper, James Stewart, Yul Brynner, Paul Newman, John Wayne and Clint Eastwood(n)

programme.title: Paint Your Wagon (1969)
programme.desc: A gold prospector buys a wife from a Mormon and agrees to share her with his mining partner when she insists they all live together. Mindful that her presence in an all-male town might give rise to jealousy, he hijacks a stagecoach carrying six working girls and opens a brothel in town. Oscar-nominated musical Western, starring Lee Marvin, Clint Eastwood, with Jean Seberg and Harve Presnell(n)

programme.title: Finding Neverland (2004)
programme.desc: Fact-based period drama based on the life of Peter Pan author JM Barrie. As a young-at-heart playwright, Barrie is uncomfortable with life in the critical spotlight. However, his friendship with four boys and their free-spirited widowed mother brings him the inspiration for his greatest work. Starring Johnny Depp, Kate Winslet, Dustin Hoffman, Julie Christie, Freddie Highmore and Kelly Macdonald(n)

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch discovers fellow inmates at Slade Prison are planning an escape over Christmas - and is so convinced the bid is doomed to fail that he takes refuge in the hospital so he cannot be blamed when the tunnel is found. Festive edition of the classic comedy from 1975, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale(n)

programme.title: Chris & Michaela - Under the Christmas Sky
programme.desc: Chris Packham and Michaela Strachan travel the world to visit areas famous for natural light displays in the sky, discovering the traditions of the local people and going in search of winter wildlife. Their journey takes them to the desert of Jordan, where they get a taste of nomadic Bedouin life, while scanning the skies for a rare planetary conjunction that could be the origin for the story of the Star of Bethlehem. Going to the opposite climatic extreme, they visit Norway's frozen wilderness to see the Northern Lights, snow-mobiling with a Sami family and discovering how eagles and reindeer thrive in icy conditions(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness and Freddie Flintoff go on a jungle adventure in Borneo with the Gurkhas, in a pair of very rare but very cheap old cars. Back in the studio, Chris Harris gets behind the wheel of the world's most luxurious SUV, and the gang is joined by Bob Mortimer(n)

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: An eco-friendly gift-wrap business gets a helping hand from Santa, and a sock entrepreneur embodies the holiday spirit with his buy-one-give-one business model. A pair of candle entrepreneurs also try to persuade the Dragons - Sara Davies, Touker Suleyman, Deborah Meaden, Tej Lalvani and Peter Jones - that their products can spark some serious profit. But while all the hopefuls dream of Dragon cash for Christmas, these investors don't give the gift of investment unless a business has real sparkle. Presented by Evan Davis(n)

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian explores the Sahara desert, where temperatures rise to 50 degrees celsius. Guided by Bobo, a local of Berber descent who was born and grew up in the desert, Romesh Ranganathan discovers a place that is vast and inhospitable, impossibly bleak and beautiful(n)

programme.title: The Ranganation
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan presents the best bits of series one. Joined by celebrity guests, his mum, and focus group The Ranganation, the comedian takes a funny, topical look at modern Britain(n)

programme.title: Cunk & Other Humans on 2019
programme.desc: Philomena Cunk and other contributors take a look back at the major events of the past 12 months. Topics may include Brexit, Joker, Theresa May, Prince Andrew, climate change, Corbyn v Johnson, Trump and Game of Thrones(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regular panellist Hugh Dennis serve up their unique festive take in a Christmas special filled with seasonal material, out-takes, best bits and hitherto unseen moments(n)

programme.title: Starter for 10 (2006)
programme.desc: A working-class student struggling to fit in at a Bristol university in the 1980s applies his formidable general knowledge to get on the college's University Challenge team. An even bigger challenge presents itself as he tries to woo a team-mate. Comedy drama, starring James McAvoy, Alice Eve, Catherine Tate, Charles Dance and Lindsay Duncan, with Mark Gatiss as quizmaster Bamber Gascoigne(n)

programme.title: Inside the Supermarket
programme.desc: Sainsbury's embarks on an ambitious makeover of its store in Hedge End, Southampton, with manager Becky and her team eager not to lose precious custom while the refurbishment takes place. At head office, two new food brands - a chorizo snack and a fresh fruit tea - are being trialled across 70 stores, while in retail, plans are under way for this year's Christmas campaign(n)

programme.title: Best House in Town
programme.desc: Competing in Cardiff for a place in the final are a renovated, three-storey semi-detached, a period semi with a modern twist and a rustic, shabby-chic home with a love of upcycling(n)

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Lofty and Dom prepare to renew their wedding vows with some special guests - but Lofty has begun to question the validity of their marriage, and is forced to consider what he really wants out of life. Sacha's daughter gives some tough advice, and Chloe tries to decide what she wants to do about her pregnancy, and realises she must tell Ange everything if she is to find peace. Casualty stars Amanda Henderson and Jamie Davis make a guest appearance(n)

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two(n)

programme.title: Mountain Vets
programme.desc: A calf born with an extraordinarily rare condition is brought in to see vet Martin Fitzpatrick at Castle Vets, where head nurse Julie Hurst advises the owners of seven-year-old cat Paws, whose weight has been steadily increasing. Vet Aidan O'Hare heads out to see Limousin bull Navarn, who has mysteriously gone lame. It is a blow to his owners because if he can't be successfully treated, he will have to be sold for meat at a serious loss. At the stud at Tullyraine Equine Clinic, breeder John books his mare Sweetbriar Rose to mate with stallion Conduit in the hope of producing a prize racehorse(n)

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Kirsty and Aimee gather the flock in from St Ninian's Isle, and inspectors arrive to check Raymond and Johnny's subsidy claim. Meanwhile, Lynn and Sandra host their first workshop at the croft, and 'the Beast from the East' wreaks havoc on Stevie's buffalo farm(n)

programme.title: Equestrian
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents action from Olympia International Horse Show at the Olympia Grand Hall in London, featuring the Grand Prix, which was won by Alberto Zorzi in 2017 and 2018(n)

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A look at television appearances made over the years by Oscar-winning Hollywood actor Charlton Heston, capturing the milestones and highlights of his life and career. Narrated by Sylvia Syms(n)

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told (1965)
programme.desc: The life of Jesus, from His lowly birth in Bethlehem and the miracles He performed, to His ultimate betrayal at the hands of disciple Judas Iscariot and His death by crucifixion. Biblical drama, starring Max von Sydow, David McCallum, Telly Savalas, Charlton Heston, Angela Lansbury and Sidney Poitier, plus several cameos including John Wayne(n)

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: David Harper and Natasha Raskin search for antiques at Watts Gallery in Surrey, and Paul Martin uncovers the story of the ceramicist and designer Mary Watts(n)

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A look at TV appearances made over the years by actor Sean Connery, capturing the milestones and highlights of his life and career. Narrated by Sylvia Syms(n)

programme.title: Entrapment (1999)
programme.desc: An elusive professional art thief suspected of stealing a priceless painting is pursued by an insurance agent. However, instead of bringing the criminal to book, she teams up with him to plot the robbery of a lifetime - although neither is sure the other can be trusted. Crime thriller, starring Sean Connery, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Ving Rhames, Will Patton and Maury Chaykin(n)

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the wildlife of the US state, including footage of manatees, baby alligators and miniature deer living in Florida's pine forests, coral reefs and famous Everglades wetlands. The programme considers the dangers facing the animal population, including natural disasters like wildfires, flooding and hurricanes, as well as the pressure of a growing human presence in their territory(n)

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: In a festive special of Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby, Giles Coren and Monica Galetti travel to Kulm Hotel St Moritz. This Swiss Alpine hotel was the birthplace of winter tourism more than 150 years ago. Back then the owner made a bet with summer guests that if they returned in the winter and did not enjoy themselves he would pay for their stay. The guests stayed for the season - and a new industry of winter leisure and sports was born. During their stay, Giles works as a bellboy alongside veteran head concierge Silvio, while Monica helps joint managing director Jenny transform her office into a private dining room for a nostalgic candlelit dinner(n)

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores unusual and unexplained natural events that occur around the world during winter, enlisting the aid of leading scientists to uncover why these strange events happen. The programme examines unusual weather conditions, including tornadoes made of snow, and animals behaving in unexpected ways, from snowboarding crows to penguins attempting death-defying feats(n)

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace visits a factory that produces 2 million tins of festive chocolate assortments a year, with 5,500 individual sweets packaged and dropped into containers every minute. Cherry Healey learns how the Royal Mail produces Christmas stamps, and also travels to Germany to join a crew of 35 ornament decorators applying glitter and paint to glass Santas. Historian Ruth Goodman goes on the trail of the festive turkey, a tradition that began in the 16th century when these birds were first introduced from Mexico.(n)

programme.title: Christmas University Challenge
programme.desc: Teams of distinguished graduates compete on behalf of their former universities as the academic quiz's festive incarnation returns, with the opening first-round match seeing the University of Leeds taking on Clare College, Cambridge. Among those facing questions from host Jeremy Paxman are broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and photographer Tim Allen for Leeds, while the Clare team includes writer Marcel Theroux and soprano Elin Manahan Thomas(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: Monica Galetti, Marcus Wareing and Gregg Wallace catch up with five of the competition's most successful past contestants, for whom taking part in the show has had a career-changing impact. Travelling to some inspiring and diverse gastronomic destinations, the judges find their past alumni making waves in the culinary world, then invite all the former finalists back to the MasterChef kitchen to demonstrate how much their food has evolved. In this spectacular rematch, there is extraordinary food and creativity on show, as the chefs battle to prove to the judges, once again, that they are best in the kitchen(n)

programme.title: A Life on Screen
programme.desc: From his early days in comedy troupe The Jockeys of Norfolk, to his breakthrough role as Charles in Four Weddings and a Funeral, Hugh Grant has become one of Britain's best-loved stars, with hits including two Bridget Jones movies, Notting Hill, Love Actually, and Paddington 2. More recently, he has turned his talents to television in the acclaimed drama A Very English Scandal, playing notorious politician Jeremy Thorpe. Aside from the Bafta-winning actor discussing his career, friends and colleagues including Andie MacDowell, Richard Curtis, Sandra Bullock, Colin Firth, Ang Lee, Stephen Frears and Nicholas Hoult also add their thoughts(n)

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Sara Pascoe introduces a special festive edition of the comedy show recorded before a packed house at London's Hammersmith Apollo, warming up the audience and then introducing routines by Chris McCausland and musical comedy double act Flo & Joan(n)

programme.title: The Lady in the Van (2015)
programme.desc: The true story of writer Alan Bennett's friendship with an eccentric homeless woman, whom he befriended in the 1970s before allowing her to park her dilapidated Bedford van outside his Camden home, where she ended up staying for 15 years. Comedy-drama, starring Maggie Smith, Alex Jennings, Roger Allam and Jim Broadbent(n)

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate (1962)
programme.desc: A distinguished Korean War veteran is brainwashed into becoming a remote-controlled killing machine. When he returns to America a hero, an old friend begins to suspect something is terribly wrong. Political thriller, starring Laurence Harvey, Frank Sinatra, Janet Leigh and Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: This week, the candidates are tasked to create advertising campaigns to entice people from the UK to visit Finland during the summer months. Half the team head to Finland to film an advert for television, whilst the others create a marketing campaign and a digital billboard to be displayed at London's Piccadilly circus. Next, the candidates pitch their campaigns to leading industry experts, including the Head of Tourism for Finland. Back in the boardroom, one of the candidates leaves the competition(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker, Margherita Taylor and Steve Brown are in Buckinghamshire, where Matt is with a group of schoolchildren making their very first visit to a farm. Margherita meets the people working hard to preserve some of the UK's last box trees and finds out what's at stake for those that use it to make fine woodwind instruments, while Steve heads to Tiggywinkles wildlife hospital, where he helps return a couple of barn owls to the wild(n)

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: The first three chefs are challenged to recreate Marcus' crab omelette Arnold Bennett, before the second trio take on Monica's puff pastry and vanilla mousseline layered dessert. Moving into the second round, the six chefs are then tasked to impress the judges with a signature dish of their own design(n)

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: Celebrities of differing faiths and beliefs don walking boots to tackle the 1,000km Italian section of the ancient Via Francigena, which starts in Canterbury and finishes in Rome, where a private audience with the Pope awaits. In the first episode, actors Les Dennis and Lesley Joseph, dancer Brendan Cole, comedians Stephen K Amos and Katy Brand, athlete Greg Rutherford, singer Dana and TV host Mehreen Baig each arrive in Switzerland to find out who is sharing their trek. In just 15 days, they will walk some sections and travel some by minibus, though the final 100km will all be on foot. Narrated by Lee Ingleby(n)

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: Pilgrims Les Dennis, Lesley Joseph, Brendan Cole, Stephen K Amos, Katy Brand, Greg Rutherford, Dana and Mehreen Baig visit Bagno Vignoni - well known for its hot springs - where Greg and Brendan take the plunge in the public pool. Meanwhile, at the top of the hillside, Dana, Stephen, Les and Katy visit the Roman bath formerly used by Popes, and explore the history of St Catherine of Siena, who also used to stay here. The group members travel on to the medieval city of Viterbo, from where they will have to walk every step of the final 100km to Rome. Narrated by Lee Ingleby(n)

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Pilgrims arrive in Sutri, a medieval town with an even older history, where they visit a magnificent Roman amphitheatre, where Lesley Joseph auditions for 'producer'. Stephen K Amos, Mehreen Baig and Les Dennis visit a church, which was originally Etruscan and pagan before becoming Roman, then Christian and finally Catholic. Later, with Rome on the horizon, they get their first view of the Eternal City from Monte Mario park, heading to St Peter's Square. Then emotions run high as they learn Pope Francis has agreed to meet them in a private audience. Narrated by Lee Ingleby(n)

programme.title: Christmas at St Paul's
programme.desc: Documentary following preparations for the festive season at the famous London cathedral, featuring unprecedented behind-the-scenes access to the Christmas countdown. With more than 45,000 visitors attending 17 services and events, the pressure is on for the team gearing up for the busiest time of the year. Celebrities including Michael Palin perform at the most glamorous event in the cathedral's calendar, while three huge Christmas trees - donated by the Queen and weighing more than a ton - are hauled into place. There's also a look at the huge logistical challenge that goes into supplying enough consecrated wine and wafers for the thousands of people who attend Midnight Mass(n)

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A retrospective look at TV appearances made over the years by award-winning actor Albert Finney, with interviews from the archive and classic clips capturing the milestones and highlights of his life and career. Narrated by Sylvia Syms(n)

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (1974)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to discover the source of the death threats that have been made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, starring Albert Finney, Lauren Bacall, Ingrid Bergman, Sean Connery and Vanessa Redgrave(n)

programme.title: Death on the Nile (1978)
programme.desc: Detective Hercule Poirot investigates a murder on board a paddle steamer in Egypt. The victim was an unpopular heiress, whose outspoken manner put her at odds with most of her fellow passengers during their cruise on the Nile. Agatha Christie mystery, starring Peter Ustinov, Bette Davis, Maggie Smith, George Kennedy, Mia Farrow, Jane Birkin, Olivia Hussey, Angela Lansbury and David Niven(n)

programme.title: A Merry Tudor Christmas with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: The historian recreates festive traditions from the reign of Henry VIII. With the aid of food historian Annie Gray, she prepares two royal feasts, including a stuffed boar's head served by a choir, and the ancestors of the modern mince pies and Christmas cake. Lucy also gets a taste of the rabble-rousing anarchy of the Lord of Misrule, listens to carol singers performing a song written by Henry VIII himself, and watches a special royal performance involving dancing stags(n)

programme.title: Carols from King's
programme.desc: The traditional celebration of Christmas from the candlelit Chapel of King's College, with the world-famous choir directed for the first time by former King's College Organ Scholar, Daniel Hyde, and a service led by the Dean, the Revd Dr Stephen Cherry, and the Chaplain, the Revd Andrew Hammond. A selection of old and new carols include the Sussex Carol (arrangement by Vaughan Williams), There Is No Rose (Elizabeth Maconchy) and O Holy Night (Adolphe Adam, arrangement by JE West). The Christmas story is told in the words of the King James Bible, with poems by Patrick Carey and Ruth Padel(n)

programme.title: The Morecambe and Wise Show: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: The first of two episodes that have not been seen since their original broadcast in 1968, and were thought to be lost until they were found by an archive preservation expert in an abandoned cinema in Sierra Leone, West Africa. The episodes have also been transformed from black-and-white into colour, by decoding colour information held within the copies. In this episode, Chris Langford sings an old favourite, Old Devil Moon, and Michael Aspel guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Morecambe and Wise Show: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: The second of two episodes of the comedy that were believed to be lost until recently, when they were uncovered inside a derelict cinema in Sierra Leone, West Africa by Philip Morris, an archive preservation expert who specialises in recovering missing tapes. Sketches in this episode, Eric and Ernie are joined by Ronnie Carroll for two Irish sketches, and Kenny Ball plays Samantha from High Society(n)

programme.title: Christmas University Challenge
programme.desc: Jeremy Paxman hosts the second round of the festive quiz featuring teams of famous graduates. This episode pits a team representing Birmingham City University, featuring The Archers' Carole Boyd and gardening expert Bunny Guinness, against alumni of Wadham College, Oxford, including journalists and broadcasters Anne McElvoy and Jonathan Freedland(n)

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Angela Scanlon discovers what happened to some of the most memorable businesses and entrepreneurs who have exited the famous Den doors over the past 17 series. Angela takes Peter Jones, Deborah Meaden, Touker Suleyman, Tej Lalvani and new Dragon Sara Davies on a trip down memory lane when she shows them footage of themselves from former series, and she meets the latest, and youngest Dragon, Sara Davies, who has been a die-hard fan of the show since her university days(n)

programme.title: Gareth Malone's Christmas Concert
programme.desc: The choirmaster puts on a show for the hard-pressed staff at Watford General Hospital, who are among the 400,000 NHS employees who will be giving up their Christmas Day this year to care for patients. Responding to a message from the chief executive of the hard-working community hospital who wants to give her workers a much-needed festive boost, Gareth sets to work enlisting the help of staff, patients and family members to produce a spectacular concert full of wonder for everyone to enjoy(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts a festive edition of the panel game, joined by regular panellist Alan Davies and guests Johnny Vegas, Sara Pascoe and Josh Widdicombe. Among the fascinating topics discussed are the aquatic equivalent of a sheepdog, why ice is slippery, and how big Dumbo's ears would have to be in order to fly. Plus, Sara reveals how her mother ruined the show for everyone and Alan achieves something he has wanted to do since QI first began(n)

programme.title: I'll Get This
programme.desc: Five celebrities go out for Christmas dinner together and between courses play a series of games, with the eventual loser having to pay for the meal. Taking part in this festive special are Strictly Come Dancing judge Shirley Ballas, comedian and TV presenter Joel Dommett, Love Island star Maura Higgins, MasterChef presenter Gregg Wallace and actor and funnyman Les Dennis(n)

programme.title: Great Expectations (2012)
programme.desc: A penniless orphan is chosen by a reclusive spinster to be a playmate for her cold-hearted ward, whom he falls in love with. As he grows up, a mysterious benefactor offers him the chance to rise into high society, but dark secrets lie behind both the object of his adoration and his newfound fortune. Period drama based on Charles Dickens' novel, starring Jeremy Irvine, Helena Bonham Carter, Ralph Fiennes and Holliday Grainger(n)

programme.title: Mrs Dickens' Family Christmas
programme.desc: Sue Perkins explores Charles Dickens' marriage through the eyes of his wife, Catherine - and exposes the reality of their festive family holiday, which was much different to the heart-warming versions he wrote about in A Christmas Carol. Focusing on the woman behind the man, Sue reveals parallels between the female characters he created and in his changing affections for his other half, explores the realities of Victorian marriage and follows Catherine's recipe for a Twelfth Night cake(n)

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Betty agrees to look after two children for the day. However, Frank's attempts at keeping the youngsters occupied soon get him into difficulties, thanks to a mischievous monkey and a pair of roller skates. Classic comedy, starring Michael Crawford and Michele Dotrice(n)

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: Margo returns her entire Christmas order because the tree is too short - and she and Jerry are left with no means to celebrate after the department store fails to redeliver in time. Tom and Barbara come to the rescue, inviting them round for a Christmas of homemade paper hats and improvised party games. Seasonal special from 1977, starring Richard Briers, Penelope Keith, Paul Eddington and Felicity Kendal(n)

programme.title: All About The Good Life
programme.desc: In !975 a new sitcom introduced viewers to the self-sufficient world of Tom and Barbara Good, who had a smallholding in their suburban back garden, much to the horror of the upwardly mobile Leadbetters next door. This documentary reveals all about the show created by Bob Larbey and John Esmonde, from the perils of filming knee-deep in mud to the ultimate accolade of performing live in front of the Queen at Television Centre. Contributors include stars Richard Briers and Penelope Keith, as well as Monty Don, Brian Sewell and John O'Farrell(n)

programme.title: The 12 Drinks of Christmas
programme.desc: Comedy actor and Pointless host Alexander Armstrong and his journalist brother-in-law Giles Coren get together to select 12 different drinks for the festive period. Their choices range from the best Christmas Eve cocktail to the wine to serve with lunch, as well as brandy, punch and the ultimate eggnog(n)

programme.title: Timeshift
programme.desc: Documentary asking why the festive meal remains the nation's last great traditional feast, and if it can continue to stand the test of time in an increasingly diverse society. With contributions by actor Simon Callow, food writer Prue Leith, cultural critic Jonathan Meades and historians Kate Colquhoun and Kathryn Hughes(n)

programme.title: TOTP2
programme.desc: Mark Radcliffe presents a selection of seasonal tunes on this festive edition, including treats from Slade, Wizzard, Shakin' Stevens, Wham!, Paul McCartney and Jona Lewie(n)

programme.title: Lucy Worsley's Christmas Carol Odyssey
programme.desc: Lucy explores the tradition of festive hymns, revealing that there is much more to the best-loved carols than meets the eye, and how they reveal the history of Christmas itself. In the ancient past, pagan fertility ritual the wassail gave rise to door-to-door singing, and was also an integral part of an older midwinter festival adopted by Christianity when it came to Britain, and was rebranded as Christmas(n)

programme.title: Charles I: Killing a King
programme.desc: Three-part documentary focusing on the monarch's final days. In the second episode, the country prepares for the unprecedented trial of the King. Although the consensus is that the King is a tyrant, only half of the commissioners appointed actually attend the meetings at Westminster Palace, in fear of being indicted as traitors. On the 20th of January 1649, the three day trial begins, and the King and the Lord President John Bradshaw become embroiled in a battle of wills(n)

programme.title: Top of the Pops: The Story of 1979
programme.desc: A look back at a heady year for the chart show, which recorded its highest audience of 19 million viewers, as physical format singles peaked at four times that number. Social problems in Britain during the Winter of Discontent did not stop inventive musicians from making hay as eager fans queued up to embrace their output, and new wave, ska, reggae, rock, folk and electro hits competed for the top slots. Among the featured artists are Gary Numan, Nile Rodgers, Jah Wobble and Woody from Madness(n)

programme.title: What We Were Watching
programme.desc: Grace Dent embarks on a televisual trip back in time as she immerses herself in the sights, sounds and schedules of TV from 40 years ago. As well as exploring what the nation's viewers enjoyed watching on the box , Grace sees if she can beat that year's Mastermind grand finalist, and sees how well she fares on The Generation Game's famous conveyor belt game(n)

programme.title: Mark Kermode's Secrets of Cinema
programme.desc: Mark Kermode celebrates one of the most perennial of all movie genres - the Christmas film. He unwraps a glittering selection of festive cinematic treats, from Hollywood blockbusters to family favourites, revealing the techniques and storytelling secrets that make them so successful. Touching on styles ranging from fairy-tale fantasy to high-octane action, family drama to horror, Mark considers how the best of these films are able to capture something magical - the Christmas spirit. But how do they do it?(n)

programme.title: Queen: Rock the World
programme.desc: Documentary following the band as they recorded their sixth album, News of the World, and made plans for a tour of the US. Back in 1977, broadcaster Bob Harris was granted exclusive access, conducting interviews with all four members, as well as filming them at work in the studio, rehearsing their North American Tour. Until recently, the documentary was never completed and the footage lay unused in the archive. The film is supplemented by footage shot in the summer of 2017 as Brian May and Roger Taylor took Queen back to the US with Adam Lambert as lead singer(n)

programme.title: Queen: The Legendary 1975 Concert
programme.desc: The rock band in performance at London's Hammersmith Odeon on Christmas Eve in 1975, featuring early singles including Liar, Keep Yourself Alive, Now I'm Here and Bohemian Rhapsody, as well as Brian May showcasing his guitar skills in Brighton Rock(n)

programme.title: Kate Bush at the BBC 1979
programme.desc: Performances by Kate Bush, recorded in 1979. Songs include Symphony in Blue, Them Heavy People, Madrigal and Man with the Child in His Eyes. Featuring guest singer Peter Gabriel, who joins the host in a rendition of Another Day and sings Here Comes the Flood(n)

programme.title: All Aboard! The Sleigh Ride
programme.desc: A two-hour sleigh ride filmed in Karasjok, Norway - 200 miles north of the Arctic Circle - shot from the point of view of a reindeer herder travelling across the frozen wilderness. Following the path of an ancient postal route, the ride captures the traditional world of the Sami people who are indigenous to northern Scandinavia and for whom reindeer herding remains a way of life(n)

programme.title: Charles I: Killing a King
programme.desc: The king continues to publicly dispute the legitimacy of the high court but after two days of witness testimonies, the evidence against him is overwhelming. When Charles enters the courtroom on the third day, he is prepared to compromise but it is too late - he is found guilty of treason and is sentenced to be executed(n)

programme.title: James May: The Reassembler
programme.desc: In a festive special, James puts together a Hornby Flying Scotsman, his favourite childhood Christmas present, which he was given in 1972 and sent him on to a path of mechanical intrigue and reassembly. Laid out in all its 138 tiny component parts, James lovingly reassembles the train as well as his memories of Christmases and toys past(n)

programme.title: The Last Igloo
programme.desc: Documentary following a day in the life of an Inuit hunter in Greenland, who builds one of the traditional ice dwellings while fishing through the sea ice. While igloos are no longer used as permanent homes, the traditional skills behind their construction are still used in building temporary shelters in the wilderness. The film captures this ingenious craft, which may be lost to the world as the ice sheet disappears(n)

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: A collection of chart-toppers from festive episodes of the music show, including the first-ever repeat showing of a recently rediscovered 1967 performance by the Rolling Stones. The programme also features perennial Christmas classics from the likes of Slade, Mud and Frankie Goes to Hollywood, as well as Ian Dury & the Blockheads, Madness, East 17, Coldplay, the Human League and the Pet Shop Boys(n)

programme.title: Martin's Close
programme.desc: In 1684, John Martin is on trial for his life, but this is not a cut and dried murder case because the young woman he is accused of killing has been seen after her death. Mark Gatiss's adaptation of MR James' ghost story, starring Peter Capaldi, Wilf Scolding, Simon Williams, Sara Crowe, James Holmes and Fisayo Akinade(n)

programme.title: The Turn of the Screw
programme.desc: A governess is sent to take care of two orphans living in a remote country house, where she is unsettled by the presence of a pair of ghosts who seem to come and go as they please - and soon suspects the youngsters know more about the spectres than they are letting on. Her anxiety builds when she learns that the previous governess, who was very close to the children, died with her lover in mysterious circumstances. Chilling one-off drama, based on Henry James' classic 1898 novella and updated to a Twenties setting. Michelle Dockery, Sue Johnston, Mark Umbers, Josef Lindsay and Eva Sayer star(n)

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy tries to find her long-lost imaginary friend, but she has to be careful as the Crosswire basement is full of bewitched boxes and gadgets(n)

programme.desc: Bitzer, Shaun and Flock are convinced that a monster is at loose on the farm, so hide in the barn(n)

programme.desc: Ed Petrie continues his road trip at the World Crazy Golf Championships in Hastings(n)

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: The doctors reveal what happens when a person suffers diarrhoea, Dr Xand gets his skates on when he meets Alexia and Kloe from CBBC's Ice Stars to investigate how they spin without getting dizzy, and there's a hidden camera experiment in Mind-Benders. Plus, the Ouch Mobile is open for more medical mysteries, and in Accident & Emergency one patient needs surgery for a broken arm, and another gets help with a painful toe(n)

programme.desc: Following 12-year-old Nikki Lily, who competed and won Junior Bake Off and is also the holder of a Pride of Britain award(n)

programme.desc: There is heavy snow on the last day before the Christmas holidays(n)

programme.desc: Hetty, on the run in London, is shocked to discover an old friend in the workhouse(n)

programme.title: Secret Life of Boys
programme.desc: Ginger plans on getting her cousins to Australia by any means necessary. She decides to prank call them until they give up and get on that plane. Ginger's plan doesn't go well though and both Corey and Chris are unphased by her ‘Ginger Snaps'. Matt tries to get Robbie to admit that he's the reason the trip is cancelled, but Matt inadvertently tells Robbie his own secret: Matt is spending Christmas with Tabitha's family. Ethan is disappointed in Matt's efforts and vows to break Robbie on his own, but his plan backfires and Chris finds out Matt's skipping Christmas. Chris tells Matt that he's going to tell their Mum. Can Matt stop him?(n)

programme.title: Secret Life of Boys
programme.desc: Robbie becomes increasingly frustrated with learning new instruments(n)

programme.desc: Chris finds out that his trap for Father Christmas won't work, Robbie gives up trying to learn new instruments and Ginger learns the real reason why no one is coming to Australia(n)
