programme.desc: The farmer receives a huge electricity bill, and decides to build a wind turbine to power the house. However, as soon as his back is turned, Shaun and the flock transform the new contraption into a futuristic fairground ride(n)

programme.title: Strange Hill High
programme.desc: Mitchell accidently traps everyone in the freezing school, meaning he cannot enjoy his Christmas holidays in the way he wanted. While the pupils and teachers are inside, mysterious things start to happen. Featuring the voices of Ben Smith, Emma Kennedy, Richard Ayoade, John Thomson and Caroline Aherne(n)

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: When Gnasher is confined to bed with a toothache, Dennis creates his own special version of the beanstalk fairy tale to cheer him up - and Dennis and Gnasher climb the beanstalk to a mystical land(n)

programme.title: Gangsta Granny
programme.desc: Family comedy based on the children's novel by David Walliams. Schoolboy Ben is bored witless after being made to stay with his grandma. All she ever wants to do is play Scrabble and eat yucky cabbage soup. But it turns out there's a whole lot more to this OAP than cardigans and toffees when she tells him how she used to be an international jewel thief - and when she admits there was one heist she never quite managed in her heyday, the pair set out on a criminal adventure. Julie McKenzie stars as the shady senior citizen, with Walliams and Miranda Hart as the boys' ballroom-dancing parents, alongside Joanna Lumley, Rob Brydon and Robbie Williams, with Reece Buttery as Ben(n)

Captain Sinker is given a snow globe Christmas present from Cook and Line but it's accidentally dropped into the Ship's Mess(n)

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels are sitting on the sofa after a busy day. Suddenly, there is a power cut. The squirrels cannot see anything, but fortunately Duggee has his torch(n)

programme.title: Tinpo
programme.desc: Tinpo and his team solve problems by asking, 'What if we tried this…?'(n)

programme.title: Messy Goes to OKIDO
programme.desc: Messy cannot wait for Christmas Day to arrive. He learns that everyone needs to get a good night's sleep, even Mother Christmas(n)

programme.title: My Petsaurus
programme.desc: It's a chilly winter's day and Chloe and her Mum are walking Topsy in the park(n)

programme.title: Woolly & Tig
programme.desc: The youngster visits her grandad for Christmas, but worries that Santa will not know where she is staying, that there is no snow for his sleigh, and that the house has no chimney(n)

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: When Cotton-tail is taken ill, Peter must bring Dr Bobtail through the woods, but unfortunately Mr Tod has other ideas for the rabbits, which involve a minty stew(n)

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: he Go Jetters are in snowy Norway to learn about the reindeer that are cared for by the local Sami people. In the spring the reindeer go on a very long journey called migration and as part of this journey they catch a ferry to take them to their warmer summer home. Grandmaster Glitch and the Grimbots are also in Norway, but their Grimbler scares the migrating reindeer and some of them run away from the herd. The Go Jetters need to keep them calm and get them back to the herd so they can finish their migration(n)

programme.title: Topsy and Tim
programme.desc: The duo decorate the tree on Christmas Eve and wrap presents for their parents(n)

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: A three-year-old bunny meets friends and experiences emotions as he engages with the world around him(n)

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Major invents a system so he can hear the other Clangers when they call him for soup(n)

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: The Tombliboos enjoy cleaning their teeth, while the Haahoos have their faces washed(n)

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: Justin Fletcher reads The Night Before Christmas, by Clement C Moore and Mark Marshall(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger Johnson and Nina Warhurst present a round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Manchester City v Leicester City at the Etihad Stadium and Everton v Arsenal at Goodison Park. Last season's corresponding fixture between the Citizens and Foxes was a pivotal one in terms of the title race. Long-serving City captain Vincent Kompany's wonder-goal was the difference between the sides, and meant Pep Guardiola's men only needed one more victory to clinch the title, which they duly accomplished a few days later. Plus, action from Aston Villa v Southampton at Villa Park, Bournemouth v Burnley at the Vitality Stadium, Brighton & Hove Albion v Sheffield United at the Amex Stadium, Newcastle United v Crystal Palace at St James' Park, and Norwich City v Wolverhampton Wanderers at Carrow Road(n)

programme.title: Britain's Christmas Story
programme.desc: Gareth Malone and Karen Gibson conclude their special series for Advent exploring Britain's Christmas traditions, unwrapping how the season has been celebrated across the centuries. They discover why a ban on Christmas led to rioting in the streets, and how the festivities were revived with a vengeance in Victorian times. As they trace the stories behind now-common traditions - and take part in less familiar ones such as pub carolling - the Archbishop of Canterbury explains how he celebrates Christmas, and why its meaning remains so relevant today(n)

programme.title: Home (2015)
programme.desc: An alien on the run from his own people arrives on Earth and embarks on an adventure with a daring young woman. It turns out to be a life-changing trip during which they begin to understand the true meaning of the word home. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Jim Parsons, Rihanna, Steve Martin and Jennifer Lopez(n)

programme.title: Snow Bears
programme.desc: Documentary following polar bears as they travel 400 miles to reach the North Pole. As spring sets in, bears and their cubs must travel north to reach the pack ice, where they will hunt seals. Their journey leads to encounters with all manner of other Arctic wildlife, including reindeer, narwhals, walrus and arctic foxes. Narrated by Kate Winslet(n)

programme.title: Tudur's TV Flashback
programme.desc: Comedian Tudur Owen looks through the archives to see how Wales has celebrated the festive season over the past 50 years. Featuring a grandmother who had her own festive grotto, a Christmas baby from 1971, a seasonal food hamper being sent to the Skerrie Islanders and a bus driver who keeps his passengers in the mood by wearing a tree on his head(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones celebrates Christmas with carols from the Assembly Hall in Belfast, including Hark The Herald, and O Little Town Of Bethlehem. With guests Katherine Jenkins, G4, Alexis Ffrench and The Lion King star Shaun Escoffery(n)

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy doll's status as his owner's favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney(n)

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar (2014)
programme.desc: Heroic flightless birds Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico uncover a plot to take over the world. Needing help to foil the evil scheme, they seek out a secret society of animal agents, led by a heroic wolf. Animated comedy spin-off, with the voices of Benedict Cumberbatch, John Malkovich and Tom McGrath(n)

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and the team visit Tyntesfield in North Somerset - a stately pile that celebrates Christmas in high Victorian style. John meets the staff getting the place spruced up, and he gets measured up for his own period outfit. Anita Rani tries her hand at making eco Christmas cards, Steve Brown creates decorations based on Victorian originals, while Ellie Harrison discovers the estate's veteran trees and learns about the novel way they are protected from livestock(n)

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: As the Magisterium closes in, Lyra learns more about Asriel's rebellion, but her assistance to him comes at great personal cost. The adaptation of Philip Pullman's fantasy adventure novel series reaches its conclusion. Starring Dafne Keen, Ruth Wilson, James McAvoy and Gary Lewis(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: In 1843, miserly businessman Scrooge is visited by a ghost from the past on a freezing Christmas Eve and is forced to face the impact of his self-interested, penny-pinching behaviour on his own life and those around him. Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight's adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce, Andy Serkis and Stephen Graham(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by studio guests to review the day's Premier League action(n)

programme.title: Women's World Cup 2019 Review
programme.desc: A look back at the tournament from France, which saw USA enter as the holders and England look for a strong showing under Phil Neville(n)

programme.title: Doddie Weir: One More Try
programme.desc: In 2016, Scottish rugby star Doddie Weir was diagnosed with motor neurone disease. Doctors said he would be in a wheelchair within a year, but instead Doddie has battled the disease and is on a mission to help find a cure. Fellow player John Beattie has followed Doddie and his family over the past two years, gaining a unique insight into the life and mission of the man behind the famous tartan suit(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: The Croods (2013)
programme.desc: Prehistoric family the Croods find themselves with nowhere to live when their cave is destroyed. They embark on a dangerous trek through an unstable landscape overrun with all manner of dangerous predators in search of a new home, but their domestic squabbles prove as much of an obstacle as the wildlife. Animated comedy, with the voices of Nicolas Cage and Ryan Reynolds(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda (2008)
programme.desc: A hero is needed to defend a peaceful valley community from attack by a rampaging snow leopard. The unlikely candidate for the job is a lazy panda, who enlists the aid of a legendary team of animal fighters and their wise master to teach him the martial arts skills he needs to fulfil his destiny. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jack Black, Dustin Hoffman, Angelina Jolie, Ian McShane and Jackie Chan(n)

programme.title: Donkey's Caroling Christmas-tacular
programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz(n)

programme.title: A Berry Royal Christmas
programme.desc: This one-off programme offers a unique look into charities that the Duke and Duchess of Cambridge support, as they invite Mary Berry to accompany them on four special visits. Mary also prepares a feast for a Christmas party hosted by the royal couple for the volunteers and gets help preparing the dishes from special guests including former Bake Off winner Nadiya Hussain - and the Duke and Duchess themselves. Throughout the programme Mary also cooks some of her favourite Christmas recipes for viewers to try out at home(n)

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 2 (1999)
programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. However, Woody becomes tempted to spend his life languishing in the safety of a museum rather than face the prospect of his owner growing up. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Brave (2012)
programme.desc: A princess defies her mother's plans to secure peace by marrying her off to the son of one of their allies. A witch provides the rebellious royal with a magic spell to change her fate, but the enchantment backfires disastrously when the queen is transformed into a bear. Pixar's animated fantasy, with the voices of Kelly Macdonald, Emma Thompson and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Nick Park's Bafta-winning film which introduced the animated inventor and his faithful canine sidekick to the world. Wallace is distraught when his cheese supplies run out, so he decides to take a trip to the moon. All he needs to do is build himself a rocket. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Billionaire Boy
programme.desc: Family comedy, by David Walliams and Kevin Cecil. Len Spud and his 12-year-old son Joe become billionaires when Len invents a new toilet roll. Len soon starts dating fortysomething hand model Sapphire Diamond, while the butler helps a neglected and unhappy Joe transfer to the local comprehensive where he conceals the facts of his wealth. However, when Len turns up at the school with his son's forgotten homework, the cat is soon out of the bag. John Thomson stars as the inventor, alongside Walliams, Catherine Tate and Rebecca Front, and featuring Warwick Davis and Bryn Terfel as themselves(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Sue Barker hosts a festive edition of the quiz, with double Olympic swimming gold medallist Rebecca Adlington, former World Superbike champion James Toseland, ex-footballer Darren Bent and 2010 Winter Olympics skeleton gold medallist Amy Williams joining team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell. All the questions over the course of the show have a Christmas theme and there is even a guest appearance by Father Christmas, who poses his own seasonal teaser to the teams(n)

programme.title: The Goes Wrong Show
programme.desc: The first of six 30-minute plays featuring the Cornley Polytechnic Drama Society sees the cast taking on an overly ambitious endeavour - the story of Santa and his elves trying to bring festive happiness to a sad little girl. However, an already surly Santa indulges in too much Christmas sherry and contrives to ruin everything. Crackers explode, an elf is trapped for the duration of the show and the toy machine tries to eat the snowman. Prolific actor Robert Grove, screen-hogging Sandra Wilkinson and artistically mistrusted Dennis Tyde struggle to contain the chaos. Comedy about an amateur dramatics group, starring Henry Lewis, Jonathan Sayer and Henry Shields(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda promises to cut back drinking in the new year, so Mick, pleased his wife is making an effort, reveals he has a Christmas surprise lined up. Keanu and Sharon remain oblivious that Phil is quizzing people who could help confirm his suspicions, while Bex tries to confront Martin about his behaviour(n)

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to put the magic back into the festive season by practising a few conjuring tricks - but things do not always go according to plan and people keep disappearing. Eric and Cyril aim to persuade their wives to try Arkwrights' special French custard, while Mrs Rossi invites Mr Newbold round for Christmas lunch. What will the Black Widow have to say when she finds out? Comedy, starring David Jason, Johnny Vegas, Kulvinder Ghir, Geoffrey Whitehead, Sue Holderness and Stephanie Cole(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: As warned by Marley, when midnight strikes, Scrooge is visited by the Spirit of Christmas Past. The spectre takes the miser on a journey that exposes his darkest childhood memories, his cut-throat business manner, his isolation and his manipulation of those around him, including the Cratchits. Adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce(n)

programme.title: Elis James: Funny Nation
programme.desc: The stand-up explores the history of Welsh comedy, radio, film and TV output, and looks back to a time when millions tuned in to a wartime radio show that was a platform for countless Welsh stars. He discusses comedy films that defined their eras, as well as much-loved sitcoms and sketch shows with their creators and stars.(n)

programme.title: Geraint Thomas: The Road Will Decide
programme.desc: Documentary following the 2018 Tour de France winner as he battled to retain the title. The film captures the intensity of his journey as he negotiates 21 stages and 3,500km in 23 days, while facing extreme weather conditions, cancelled stages and competitors such as France's Julian Alaphilippe(n)

programme.title: King Gary
programme.desc: Comedy pilot about a working-class couple's aspirations to achieve social acceptance and moderate material success in competitive suburbia. Gary plans to throw the biggest barbecue in history to win over the rest of the neighbourhood - only to discover someone else is planning to hold one of their own on the same day. Meanwhile, Terri makes a disastrous attempt at 'micro-blading'. Starring Tom Davis and Laura Checkley, with Simon Day, Camille Coduri and Romesh Ranganathan(n)

programme.title: Famalam
programme.desc: Highlights from the comedy sketch show, including an overprotective boyfriend meeting his match, and Scribbler P giving an important lesson on military history. Plus, the competitive aunties cause havoc, Midsomer receives an injection of diversity as Detective Mountree solves a whodunit in a stately home and Fantastic Egusi Films give their inimitable rendition of a Hollywood blockbuster. Starring Vivienne Acheampong, Gbemisola Ikumelo, Samson Kayo, John Macmillan, Tom Moutchi and Akemnji Ndifornyen(n)

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Robbie Williams surprises some karaoke-singing members of the audience with special renditions of his classic hits in Robbie-oke, and gives a performance of Winter Wonderland. Plus, Ian Wright hands over his phone for Send To All, and three young brothers get the surprise of their lives when they take part in an Escape Room, but find themselves on stage at the London Palladium to become the Unexpected Stars of the Show(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Naga Munchetty and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: CBeebies Hansel & Gretel
programme.desc: The stars of CBeebies bring the story of Hansel and Gretel to life, with a vibrant 1980s twist, and a number of classic pop hits from the decade. Featuring Cat Sandion and Molly and Mack's Joshua Haynes as the intrepid youngsters, alongside Andy Day, Maddie Moate and Waffle the Wonder Dog, making his CBeebies panto debut(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book. It tells the tale of a little mouse who takes a walk through the woods in search of a nut, only to encounter a fox, an owl and a snake who all want to eat him. To escape their clutches, the quick-witted rodent creates an imaginary monster to scare away his attackers - but it turns out to be all too real. Robbie Coltrane heads the voice cast as the Gruffalo, with James Corden as the Mouse and Rob Brydon, John Hurt and Tom Wilkinson as the predators(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo's Child
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of the sequel to Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book, reuniting all the voice cast from the original. The Gruffalo has raised his daughter on tales of the big, bad mouse, the only creature in the forest he is frightened of. Despite her father's warnings, she sets off in search of this scary creature, along the way encountering the snake, owl and the fox. But when she still has no luck finding the evil rodent, she begins to think he does not exist after all. Robbie Coltrane, James Corden and Rob Brydon lend their voices, with Shirley Henderson as Gruffalo Jr(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3 (2016)
programme.desc: The clumsy hero is reunited with his long-lost father, whose help he will need when a supernatural foe threatens all of China. Father and son travel to a secret village populated by other pandas, and must train them in martial arts so they can defend their home. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black, Bryan Cranston, Angelina Jolie and Dustin Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble spend Christmas with the animals. Two Siberian tiger cubs take their first steps into the park - and have their first encounter with cars. Elsewhere, the staff at the house face their biggest challenge of the year - finding a tree on the estate that is just the right size for the stately home, chop it down, and get it inside without causing any damage. Plus, Jean Johansson mucks in with the keepers to hand out Christmas treats to their much-loved creatures(n)

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty(n)

programme.title: Frozen (2013)
programme.desc: A princess with the power to freeze anything she touches loses control of her abilities and plunges the kingdom into a perpetual winter. She goes into hiding, but her sister remains determined that she can be saved from her own magic and sets off on a quest to find her, aided by a mountain man and a living snowman. Disney animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Kristen Bell and Idina Menzel(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Wrong Trousers
programme.desc: Nick Park's Oscar-winning animation featuring the bumbling inventor and his faithful dog, whose lives are turned upside down after foolishly offering board and lodgings to villainous penguin Feathers McGraw. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast (2017)
programme.desc: A prince is transformed into a hideous monster as punishment for his selfishness, and can only regain his human form by finding true love. Salvation comes in the form of a spirited young inventor, who offers to take her father's place when he is imprisoned in the monster's castle. But as romance blossoms between the unlikely pair, a jealous rival suitor only sees a beast to be slain. Live action remake of the Disney animated fairytale, starring Emma Watson, Dan Stevens and Luke Evans, with Ewan McGregor, Emma Thompson and Ian McKellen playing the Beast's entourage of living ornaments(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The Beales and Mitchells gather to celebrate Keanu and Louise's return to the Square - but unbeknown to everyone, all hell is about to break loose. A mix-up over what to wear on a night out embarrasses Linda and she ends up drowning her sorrows in the middle of the Square - unaware her Christmas surprise has arrived in the shape of prodigal son Lee. Martin is filled with panic after the previous night's incident, leaving Bex and Sonia concerned for his welfare, and Denise is determined to prove Sheree is not all she says she is(n)

programme.title: Take Off with Bradley and Holly
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and Holly Willoughby present a special Christmas family entertainment show, which offers members of the audience the chance to win the holiday of a lifetime to Lapland. The show will also feature special games, surprises and appearances by celebrity guests(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Scrooge is confronted with another spirit, which has assumed a familiar form drawn from his own tortured past. He witnesses the present day, and the seemingly happy Christmas enjoyed by the Cratchit family - but also learns there are cracks beneath the surface which he is responsible for making. The final ghost arrives to give Scrooge a glimpse of what the future holds - and a tragedy that will force him to confront the consequences of his misdeeds(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitably festive way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star(n)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers(n)

programme.title: Midnight Mass - BBC
programme.desc: Live Christmas Eve service from Croydon Minster, led by Revd Dr Andrew Bishop. The preacher is the Bishop of Croydon, the Rt Revd Jonathan Clark. The choir, directed by Ronny Krippner, sing Mozart's Great Credo Mass in C and lead the congregation in a number of well-loved carols, including It Came Upon a Midnight Clear and Hark! The Herald Angels Sing, accompanied by organist Tom Little(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger Johnson and Nina Warhurst present a round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Manchester City v Leicester City at the Etihad Stadium and Everton v Arsenal at Goodison Park. Their journey leads to encounters with all manner of other Arctic wildlife, including reindeer, narwhals, walrus and arctic foxes. Narrated by Kate Winslet(n)

programme.title: Hold the Sunset
programme.desc: Edith and her family celebrate their last Christmas together before she and Phil set off for their dream retirement in the Mediterranean. However, things do not go to plan as Edith's son Roger decides to invite her scurrilous one-time flame Bob to join in with the festivities, and Edith's sister Joan makes it clear to all that she will not be watching the Queen's Speech anywhere else. Meanwhile, Queenie locks Sandra and Wendy into a wardrobe, and Phil finds himself talking to a ghost. Christmas special from 2018, guest starring Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones celebrates Christmas with carols from the Assembly Hall in Belfast, including Hark The Herald, and O Little Town Of Bethlehem. With guests Katherine Jenkins, G4, Alexis Ffrench and The Lion King star Shaun Escoffery(n)

Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by studio guests to review the day's Premier League action(n)

programme.title: Sportscene
programme.desc: Steven Thompson is joined by Michael Stewart to present action from the weekend's Premiership fixtures, including Celtic v Aberdeen at Celtic Park and Kilmarnock v Motherwell at Rugby Park(n)

programme.title: Women's World Cup 2019 Review
programme.desc: A look back at the tournament from France, which saw USA enter as the holders and England look for a strong showing under Phil Neville(n)

programme.title: Doddie Weir: One More Try
programme.desc: In 2016, Scottish rugby star Doddie Weir was diagnosed with motor neurone disease. Doctors said he would be in a wheelchair within a year, but instead Doddie has battled the disease and is on a mission to help find a cure. Fellow player John Beattie has followed Doddie and his family over the past two years, gaining a unique insight into the life and mission of the man behind the famous tartan suit(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: The Croods (2013)
programme.desc: Prehistoric family the Croods find themselves with nowhere to live when their cave is destroyed. They embark on a dangerous trek through an unstable landscape overrun with all manner of dangerous predators in search of a new home, but their domestic squabbles prove as much of an obstacle as the wildlife. Animated comedy, with the voices of Nicolas Cage and Ryan Reynolds(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda (2008)
programme.desc: A hero is needed to defend a peaceful valley community from attack by a rampaging snow leopard. The unlikely candidate for the job is a lazy panda, who enlists the aid of a legendary team of animal fighters and their wise master to teach him the martial arts skills he needs to fulfil his destiny. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jack Black, Dustin Hoffman, Angelina Jolie, Ian McShane and Jackie Chan(n)

programme.title: Donkey's Caroling Christmas-tacular
programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz(n)

programme.title: A Berry Royal Christmas
programme.desc: This one-off programme offers a unique look into charities that the Duke and Duchess of Cambridge support, as they invite Mary Berry to accompany them on four special visits. Mary also prepares a feast for a Christmas party hosted by the royal couple for the volunteers and gets help preparing the dishes from special guests including former Bake Off winner Nadiya Hussain - and the Duke and Duchess themselves. Throughout the programme Mary also cooks some of her favourite Christmas recipes for viewers to try out at home(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 2 (1999)
programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. However, Woody becomes tempted to spend his life languishing in the safety of a museum rather than face the prospect of his owner growing up. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Brave (2012)
programme.desc: A princess defies her mother's plans to secure peace by marrying her off to the son of one of their allies. A witch provides the rebellious royal with a magic spell to change her fate, but the enchantment backfires disastrously when the queen is transformed into a bear. Pixar's animated fantasy, with the voices of Kelly Macdonald, Emma Thompson and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Nick Park's Bafta-winning film which introduced the animated inventor and his faithful canine sidekick to the world. Wallace is distraught when his cheese supplies run out, so he decides to take a trip to the moon. All he needs to do is build himself a rocket. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Billionaire Boy
programme.desc: Family comedy, by David Walliams and Kevin Cecil. Len Spud and his 12-year-old son Joe become billionaires when Len invents a new toilet roll. Len soon starts dating fortysomething hand model Sapphire Diamond, while the butler helps a neglected and unhappy Joe transfer to the local comprehensive where he conceals the facts of his wealth. However, when Len turns up at the school with his son's forgotten homework, the cat is soon out of the bag. John Thomson stars as the inventor, alongside Walliams, Catherine Tate and Rebecca Front, and featuring Warwick Davis and Bryn Terfel as themselves(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: Five Wishes
programme.desc: Documentary following members of Scottish Ballet as they head out into communities across Scotland to tackle five special requests that could only be granted by the dance company. From 11-year-old Lily who is battling with cancer, to the Every Voice Choir in Dumbarton, the programme reveals stories of love, hope and courage - all told with a balletic twist(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda promises to cut back drinking in the new year, so Mick, pleased his wife is making an effort, reveals he has a Christmas surprise lined up. Keanu and Sharon remain oblivious that Phil is quizzing people who could help confirm his suspicions, while Bex tries to confront Martin about his behaviour(n)

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to put the magic back into the festive season by practising a few conjuring tricks - but things do not always go according to plan and people keep disappearing. Eric and Cyril aim to persuade their wives to try Arkwrights' special French custard, while Mrs Rossi invites Mr Newbold round for Christmas lunch. What will the Black Widow have to say when she finds out? Comedy, starring David Jason, Johnny Vegas, Kulvinder Ghir, Geoffrey Whitehead, Sue Holderness and Stephanie Cole(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: As warned by Marley, when midnight strikes, Scrooge is visited by the Spirit of Christmas Past. The spectre takes the miser on a journey that exposes his darkest childhood memories, his cut-throat business manner, his isolation and his manipulation of those around him, including the Cratchits. Adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Sue Barker hosts a festive edition of the quiz, with double Olympic swimming gold medallist Rebecca Adlington, former World Superbike champion James Toseland, ex-footballer Darren Bent and 2010 Winter Olympics skeleton gold medallist Amy Williams joining team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell. All the questions over the course of the show have a Christmas theme and there is even a guest appearance by Father Christmas, who poses his own seasonal teaser to the teams(n)

programme.title: King Gary
programme.desc: Comedy pilot about a working-class couple's aspirations to achieve social acceptance and moderate material success in competitive suburbia. Gary plans to throw the biggest barbecue in history to win over the rest of the neighbourhood - only to discover someone else is planning to hold one of their own on the same day. Meanwhile, Terri makes a disastrous attempt at 'micro-blading'. Starring Tom Davis and Laura Checkley, with Simon Day, Camille Coduri and Romesh Ranganathan(n)

programme.title: Famalam
programme.desc: Highlights from the comedy sketch show, including an overprotective boyfriend meeting his match, and Scribbler P giving an important lesson on military history. Plus, the competitive aunties cause havoc, Midsomer receives an injection of diversity as Detective Mountree solves a whodunit in a stately home and Fantastic Egusi Films give their inimitable rendition of a Hollywood blockbuster. Starring Vivienne Acheampong, Gbemisola Ikumelo, Samson Kayo, John Macmillan, Tom Moutchi and Akemnji Ndifornyen(n)

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Black Mirror creator Charlie Brooker hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with broadcaster Emma Barnett and comedian Phil Wang joining captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's events(n)

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Taking a place on Graham's festive sofa, from the new blockbuster Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker are John Boyega and Daisy Ridley, alongside Superman himself, Henry Cavill, who is appearing in new Netflix fantasy drama series The Witcher. Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon, reunited for the much-anticipated Gavin & Stacey Christmas special, also appear. Plus, Robbie Williams performs a song from his new album The Christmas Present, and more intrepid audience members willing to recount an anecdote from the dreaded red chair try their luck(n)

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Robbie Williams surprises some karaoke-singing members of the audience with special renditions of his classic hits in Robbie-oke, and gives a performance of Winter Wonderland. Plus, Ian Wright hands over his phone for Send To All, and three young brothers get the surprise of their lives when they take part in an Escape Room, but find themselves on stage at the London Palladium to become the Unexpected Stars of the Show(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Naga Munchetty and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: CBeebies Hansel & Gretel
programme.desc: The stars of CBeebies bring the story of Hansel and Gretel to life, with a vibrant 1980s twist, and a number of classic pop hits from the decade. Featuring Cat Sandion and Molly and Mack's Joshua Haynes as the intrepid youngsters, alongside Andy Day, Maddie Moate and Waffle the Wonder Dog, making his CBeebies panto debut(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book. It tells the tale of a little mouse who takes a walk through the woods in search of a nut, only to encounter a fox, an owl and a snake who all want to eat him. To escape their clutches, the quick-witted rodent creates an imaginary monster to scare away his attackers - but it turns out to be all too real. Robbie Coltrane heads the voice cast as the Gruffalo, with James Corden as the Mouse and Rob Brydon, John Hurt and Tom Wilkinson as the predators(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo's Child
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of the sequel to Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book, reuniting all the voice cast from the original. The Gruffalo has raised his daughter on tales of the big, bad mouse, the only creature in the forest he is frightened of. Despite her father's warnings, she sets off in search of this scary creature, along the way encountering the snake, owl and the fox. But when she still has no luck finding the evil rodent, she begins to think he does not exist after all. Robbie Coltrane, James Corden and Rob Brydon lend their voices, with Shirley Henderson as Gruffalo Jr(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3 (2016)
programme.desc: The clumsy hero is reunited with his long-lost father, whose help he will need when a supernatural foe threatens all of China. Father and son travel to a secret village populated by other pandas, and must train them in martial arts so they can defend their home. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black, Bryan Cranston, Angelina Jolie and Dustin Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble spend Christmas with the animals. Two Siberian tiger cubs take their first steps into the park - and have their first encounter with cars. Elsewhere, the staff at the house face their biggest challenge of the year - finding a tree on the estate that is just the right size for the stately home, chop it down, and get it inside without causing any damage. Plus, Jean Johansson mucks in with the keepers to hand out Christmas treats to their much-loved creatures(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty(n)

programme.title: Frozen (2013)
programme.desc: A princess with the power to freeze anything she touches loses control of her abilities and plunges the kingdom into a perpetual winter. She goes into hiding, but her sister remains determined that she can be saved from her own magic and sets off on a quest to find her, aided by a mountain man and a living snowman. Disney animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Kristen Bell and Idina Menzel(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Wrong Trousers
programme.desc: Nick Park's Oscar-winning animation featuring the bumbling inventor and his faithful dog, whose lives are turned upside down after foolishly offering board and lodgings to villainous penguin Feathers McGraw. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast (2017)
programme.desc: A prince is transformed into a hideous monster as punishment for his selfishness, and can only regain his human form by finding true love. Salvation comes in the form of a spirited young inventor, who offers to take her father's place when he is imprisoned in the monster's castle. But as romance blossoms between the unlikely pair, a jealous rival suitor only sees a beast to be slain. Live action remake of the Disney animated fairytale, starring Emma Watson, Dan Stevens and Luke Evans, with Ewan McGregor, Emma Thompson and Ian McKellen playing the Beast's entourage of living ornaments(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The Beales and Mitchells gather to celebrate Keanu and Louise's return to the Square - but unbeknown to everyone, all hell is about to break loose. A mix-up over what to wear on a night out embarrasses Linda and she ends up drowning her sorrows in the middle of the Square - unaware her Christmas surprise has arrived in the shape of prodigal son Lee. Martin is filled with panic after the previous night's incident, leaving Bex and Sonia concerned for his welfare, and Denise is determined to prove Sheree is not all she says she is(n)

programme.title: Take Off with Bradley and Holly
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and Holly Willoughby present a special Christmas family entertainment show, which offers members of the audience the chance to win the holiday of a lifetime to Lapland. The show will also feature special games, surprises and appearances by celebrity guests(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Scrooge is confronted with another spirit, which has assumed a familiar form drawn from his own tortured past. He witnesses the present day, and the seemingly happy Christmas enjoyed by the Cratchit family - but also learns there are cracks beneath the surface which he is responsible for making. The final ghost arrives to give Scrooge a glimpse of what the future holds - and a tragedy that will force him to confront the consequences of his misdeeds(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitably festive way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star(n)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers(n)

programme.title: Christmas Celebration
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson introduces carols and readings from St John's Kirk, Perth. The congregation includes singers from all over Perthshire. The traditional Biblical accounts of the birth of Jesus, along with modern meditations, are read by 13 pupils from nine Perth primary and senior schools. The organist is Howard Duthie, and the minister is the Rev John Murdoch(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger Johnson and Nina Warhurst present a round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Manchester City v Leicester City at the Etihad Stadium and Everton v Arsenal at Goodison Park. Last season's corresponding fixture between the Citizens and Foxes was a pivotal one in terms of the title race. Long-serving City captain Vincent Kompany's wonder-goal was the difference between the sides, and meant Pep Guardiola's men only needed one more victory to clinch the title, which they duly accomplished a few days later. Plus, action from Aston Villa v Southampton at Villa Park, Bournemouth v Burnley at the Vitality Stadium, Brighton & Hove Albion v Sheffield United at the Amex Stadium, Newcastle United v Crystal Palace at St James' Park, and Norwich City v Wolverhampton Wanderers at Carrow Road(n)

programme.title: Britain's Christmas Story
programme.desc: Gareth Malone and Karen Gibson conclude their special series for Advent exploring Britain's Christmas traditions, unwrapping how the season has been celebrated across the centuries. They discover why a ban on Christmas led to rioting in the streets, and how the festivities were revived with a vengeance in Victorian times. As they trace the stories behind now-common traditions - and take part in less familiar ones such as pub carolling - the Archbishop of Canterbury explains how he celebrates Christmas, and why its meaning remains so relevant today(n)

programme.title: Home (2015)
programme.desc: An alien on the run from his own people arrives on Earth and embarks on an adventure with a daring young woman. It turns out to be a life-changing trip during which they begin to understand the true meaning of the word home. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Jim Parsons, Rihanna, Steve Martin and Jennifer Lopez(n)

programme.title: Snow Bears
programme.desc: Documentary following polar bears as they travel 400 miles to reach the North Pole. As spring sets in, bears and their cubs must travel north to reach the pack ice, where they will hunt seals. Their journey leads to encounters with all manner of other Arctic wildlife, including reindeer, narwhals, walrus and arctic foxes. Narrated by Kate Winslet(n)

programme.title: Hold the Sunset
programme.desc: Edith and her family celebrate their last Christmas together before she and Phil set off for their dream retirement in the Mediterranean. However, things do not go to plan as Edith's son Roger decides to invite her scurrilous one-time flame Bob to join in with the festivities, and Edith's sister Joan makes it clear to all that she will not be watching the Queen's Speech anywhere else. Meanwhile, Queenie locks Sandra and Wendy into a wardrobe, and Phil finds himself talking to a ghost. Christmas special from 2018, guest starring Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones celebrates Christmas with carols from the Assembly Hall in Belfast, including Hark The Herald, and O Little Town Of Bethlehem. With guests Katherine Jenkins, G4, Alexis Ffrench and The Lion King star Shaun Escoffery(n)

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy doll's status as his owner's favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney(n)

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar (2014)
programme.desc: Heroic flightless birds Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico uncover a plot to take over the world. Needing help to foil the evil scheme, they seek out a secret society of animal agents, led by a heroic wolf. Animated comedy spin-off, with the voices of Benedict Cumberbatch, John Malkovich and Tom McGrath(n)

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and the team visit Tyntesfield in North Somerset - a stately pile that celebrates Christmas in high Victorian style. John meets the staff getting the place spruced up, and he gets measured up for his own period outfit. Anita Rani tries her hand at making eco Christmas cards, Steve Brown creates decorations based on Victorian originals, while Ellie Harrison discovers the estate's veteran trees and learns about the novel way they are protected from livestock(n)

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: As the Magisterium closes in, Lyra learns more about Asriel's rebellion, but her assistance to him comes at great personal cost. The adaptation of Philip Pullman's fantasy adventure novel series reaches its conclusion. Starring Dafne Keen, Ruth Wilson, James McAvoy and Gary Lewis(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: In 1843, miserly businessman Scrooge is visited by a ghost from the past on a freezing Christmas Eve and is forced to face the impact of his self-interested, penny-pinching behaviour on his own life and those around him. Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight's adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce, Andy Serkis and Stephen Graham(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by studio guests to review the day's Premier League action(n)

programme.title: Women's World Cup 2019 Review
programme.desc: A look back at the tournament from France, which saw USA enter as the holders and England look for a strong showing under Phil Neville(n)

programme.title: Doddie Weir: One More Try
programme.desc: In 2016, Scottish rugby star Doddie Weir was diagnosed with motor neurone disease. Doctors said he would be in a wheelchair within a year, but instead Doddie has battled the disease and is on a mission to help find a cure. Fellow player John Beattie has followed Doddie and his family over the past two years, gaining a unique insight into the life and mission of the man behind the famous tartan suit(n)

programme.desc: Jon Kay and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.desc: Animated short following the efforts of lovable Shrek character Donkey, who tries to get his friends in a festive mood by singing a series of Christmas songs. Featuring the voices of Eddie Murphy, Mike Myers and Cameron Diaz(n)

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland(n)

All the questions over the course of the show have a Christmas theme and there is even a guest appearance by Father Christmas, who poses his own seasonal teaser to the teams(n)

programme.title: The Goes Wrong Show
programme.desc: The first of six 30-minute plays featuring the Cornley Polytechnic Drama Society sees the cast taking on an overly ambitious endeavour - the story of Santa and his elves trying to bring festive happiness to a sad little girl. However, an already surly Santa indulges in too much Christmas sherry and contrives to ruin everything. Crackers explode, an elf is trapped for the duration of the show and the toy machine tries to eat the snowman. Prolific actor Robert Grove, screen-hogging Sandra Wilkinson and artistically mistrusted Dennis Tyde struggle to contain the chaos. Comedy about an amateur dramatics group, starring Henry Lewis, Jonathan Sayer and Henry Shields(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda promises to cut back drinking in the new year, so Mick, pleased his wife is making an effort, reveals he has a Christmas surprise lined up. programme.title: Roy Walker: Beyond a Joke
programme.desc: Roy Walker, one of Northern Ireland's most popular comedians, reflects on the extraordinary highs and lows of his life and career as he approaches his 80th birthday(n)

programme.desc: Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book. It tells the tale of a little mouse who takes a walk through the woods in search of a nut, only to encounter a fox, an owl and a snake who all want to eat him. To escape their clutches, the quick-witted rodent creates an imaginary monster to scare away his attackers - but it turns out to be all too real. Robbie Coltrane heads the voice cast as the Gruffalo, with James Corden as the Mouse and Rob Brydon, John Hurt and Tom Wilkinson as the predators(n)

programme.title: The Gruffalo's Child
programme.desc: Animated adaptation of the sequel to Julia Donaldson's best-selling children's book, reuniting all the voice cast from the original. The Gruffalo has raised his daughter on tales of the big, bad mouse, the only creature in the forest he is frightened of. Despite her father's warnings, she sets off in search of this scary creature, along the way encountering the snake, owl and the fox. But when she still has no luck finding the evil rodent, she begins to think he does not exist after all. Robbie Coltrane, James Corden and Rob Brydon lend their voices, with Shirley Henderson as Gruffalo Jr(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3 (2016)
programme.desc: The clumsy hero is reunited with his long-lost father, whose help he will need when a supernatural foe threatens all of China. Father and son travel to a secret village populated by other pandas, and must train them in martial arts so they can defend their home. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black, Bryan Cranston, Angelina Jolie and Dustin Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble spend Christmas with the animals. Two Siberian tiger cubs take their first steps into the park - and have their first encounter with cars. Elsewhere, the staff at the house face their biggest challenge of the year - finding a tree on the estate that is just the right size for the stately home, chop it down, and get it inside without causing any damage. Plus, Jean Johansson mucks in with the keepers to hand out Christmas treats to their much-loved creatures(n)

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland(n)

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty(n)

programme.title: Frozen (2013)
programme.desc: A princess with the power to freeze anything she touches loses control of her abilities and plunges the kingdom into a perpetual winter. She goes into hiding, but her sister remains determined that she can be saved from her own magic and sets off on a quest to find her, aided by a mountain man and a living snowman. Disney animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Kristen Bell and Idina Menzel(n)

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Wrong Trousers
programme.desc: Nick Park's Oscar-winning animation featuring the bumbling inventor and his faithful dog, whose lives are turned upside down after foolishly offering board and lodgings to villainous penguin Feathers McGraw. With the voice of Peter Sallis(n)

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast (2017)
programme.desc: A prince is transformed into a hideous monster as punishment for his selfishness, and can only regain his human form by finding true love. Salvation comes in the form of a spirited young inventor, who offers to take her father's place when he is imprisoned in the monster's castle. But as romance blossoms between the unlikely pair, a jealous rival suitor only sees a beast to be slain. Live action remake of the Disney animated fairytale, starring Emma Watson, Dan Stevens and Luke Evans, with Ewan McGregor, Emma Thompson and Ian McKellen playing the Beast's entourage of living ornaments(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The Beales and Mitchells gather to celebrate Keanu and Louise's return to the Square - but unbeknown to everyone, all hell is about to break loose. A mix-up over what to wear on a night out embarrasses Linda and she ends up drowning her sorrows in the middle of the Square - unaware her Christmas surprise has arrived in the shape of prodigal son Lee. Martin is filled with panic after the previous night's incident, leaving Bex and Sonia concerned for his welfare, and Denise is determined to prove Sheree is not all she says she is(n)

programme.title: Take Off with Bradley and Holly
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and Holly Willoughby present a special Christmas family entertainment show, which offers members of the audience the chance to win the holiday of a lifetime to Lapland. The show will also feature special games, surprises and appearances by celebrity guests(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Scrooge is confronted with another spirit, which has assumed a familiar form drawn from his own tortured past. He witnesses the present day, and the seemingly happy Christmas enjoyed by the Cratchit family - but also learns there are cracks beneath the surface which he is responsible for making. The final ghost arrives to give Scrooge a glimpse of what the future holds - and a tragedy that will force him to confront the consequences of his misdeeds(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitably festive way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star(n)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers(n)

programme.title: Midnight Mass - BBC
programme.desc: Live Christmas Eve service from Croydon Minster, led by Revd Dr Andrew Bishop. The preacher is the Bishop of Croydon, the Rt Revd Jonathan Clark. The choir, directed by Ronny Krippner, sing Mozart's Great Credo Mass in C and lead the congregation in a number of well-loved carols, including It Came Upon a Midnight Clear and Hark! The Herald Angels Sing, accompanied by organist Tom Little(n)

programme.desc: Mark D'Arcy talks to politics professors Tim Bale and Paul Webb about their new book 'Footsoldiers' on political party membership.(n)

programme.title: The Reith Lectures
programme.desc: Jonathan Sumption argues against Britain adopting a written constitution as a response to political alienation, suggesting that it would be better change the system of voting. Presented and chaired by Anita Anand(n)

programme.title: Prime Properties
programme.desc: The first Duke of Wellington - victor at the Battle of Waterloo - was a military hero who served twice as Prime Minister. Carolyn Quinn meets the current Duke for a tour of the family's London home, Apsley House(n)

programme.title: House of Commons
programme.desc: He is one of the most controversial figures to have sat in the Speaker's chair in the House of Commons. As John Bercow bows out after ten controversial years as Speaker, BBC Parliament revisits the career of a modernising but polarising figure. See the teenage Bercow's ‘Question Time' debut, not from the Commons but on the TV programme. Relive the former Tory MP's clashes with ministers as he's accused of bias and of bending the rules to try to stop Brexit. In addition - with more Commons archive - Bercow Bows Out offers the chance to re-live some of his favourite unique phrases, whether he's advising an MP to search for ‘a soothing medicament' or accusing others of ‘chuntering from a sedentary position'(n)

programme.title: The Reith Lectures
programme.desc: Jonathan Sumption was until recently a justice of the UK's Supreme Court, as well as being a distinguished historian. He argues that the law is taking over the space once occupied by politics. Presented and chaired by Anita Anand(n)

programme.title: House of Commons
programme.desc: Highlights from The Queen's Speech debate in the House of Commons, including speeches by Prime Minister Boris Johnson, Leader of the Opposition Jeremy Corbyn and the SNP leader at Westminster Ian Blackford, from Thursday 19 December(n)

programme.desc: In the second programme in a series of half-hour unscripted talks on party splits, political journalist Steve Richards looks at Joseph Chamberlain who first split the Liberal Party and later the Unionists(n)

programme.desc: Jonathan Sumption assesses the US and UK's constitutional models. He describes Britain's unwritten constitution as a political institution. Recorded in front of an audience at George Washington University in Washington DC(n)

programme.title: HARDtalk
programme.desc: What makes a whistleblower? What prompts someone to break ranks, maybe break the law in order to expose a secret, often at great cost? Stephen Sackur interviews Katharine Gun. In 2003 she worked at the UK's signals intelligence agency GCHQ. She leaked potentially explosive information about America's covert effort to sway UN diplomats to support the Iraq war. She risked everything, including prison, in an act that changed her life. Now her story has been made into a movie; but 16 years on has her perspective changed?(n)

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear
programme.desc: Juliet conjures up some ideas for Christmas, including baked party canapes, a brussels sprouts tarte tatin and a spectacular chocolate orange profiteroles tower. Liam Charles pays a visit to serve up Christmas lunch on a sheet of ruff puff pastry and Juliet visits chef Chantelle Nicholson in her London restaurant to sample a vegan main course Christmas meal(n)

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa cook up some family festive favourites, including glazed ham, a baked Tunworth cheese with onions and potatoes, and mini turkey and ham pies. Plus, Lisa decorates the tree with some beautiful Christmas biscuits(n)

programme.title: Nadia's Family Feasts
programme.desc: Nadia Sawalha and Alex Hollywood help to prepare a festive family feast, including Nadia's annual tradition of hot sausage and cheddar rolls for breakfast, ginger gammon with tartiflette for lunch, a recipe for the ultimate turkey dinner, and Alex's delicious alternative to dessert with a white chocolate, raspberry and cranberry brioche for pudding(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate when a man collapses and dies outside a pub after a fight with his brother-in-law. The discovery of suspicious burn marks on the victim's forehead reveals sinister secrets and when a second body is found, the detectives are drawn into a world of superstition and family tensions. Murder mystery with John Nettles, John Hopkins and guest starring Geoffrey Whitehead(n)

programme.title: How to Spend It Well at Christmas with Phillip Schofield
programme.desc: The presenter takes a look at the best Christmas deals on food and drink. The stars of The Real Housewives of Cheshire take a blind taste test to see if they can tell the difference between supermarket sparkling wine and real champagne. Mother and daughter Janet Ellis and Sophie Ellis-Bextor get to grips with some 1970s-style retro kitchen appliances, and Matt Tebbutt samples Phillip's efforts with a DIY home gin-making kit(n)

programme.title: The Big Quiz
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the annual clash between ITV's biggest soaps, with team captains Jack P Shepherd (David Platt) and Mark Charnock (Marlon Dingle) returning to lead colleagues from Coronation Street and Emmerdale in a battle to find out who knows their soap best. Lining up from the cobbles are Sue Nicholls (Audrey Roberts), Alan Halsall (Tyrone Dobbs) and Alexandra Mardell (Emma Brooker), while making their way from the Dales are Lisa Riley (Mandy Dingle), Isabel Hodgins (Victoria Sugden) and Nick Miles (Jimmy King)(n)

programme.title: The Pride of Britain Awards
programme.desc: Carol Vorderman, who is synonymous with the uplifting annual event, hits the road to visit some of the ceremony's winners over its two-decade history. In Torbay, she catches up with winners of the Emergency Services award - six of the seven crew of the RNLI who risked their lives to save eight stranded seamen. Carol walks the walk with fundraiser of the year 2008 Nina Barough and does a milk round with crime-fighting milkman and now MBE Tony Fowler. She also meets Rachel Edwards, who aged seven collected a Child of Courage award in 2001(n)

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a Christmas Celebrity Special of the game show, with Davina McCall, Jarvis Cocker and Jo Brand hoping to win the £50,000 jackpot for their chosen charity. That's if they can guess what Mr Chips is doing(n)

programme.title: Dancing on Ice
programme.desc: Phillip Schofield and Holly Willoughby present the launch show for the 12th series of the skating challenge. The famous faces taking part this year are magician Ben Hanlin, reality TV star Maura Higgins, Diversity member Perri Kiely, model and businesswoman Caprice, TV presenter Trisha Goddard, actress Lisa George, Paralympian Libby Clegg, ex-EastEnder Joe Swash, Steps singer Ian 'H' Watkins, newsreader Lucrezia Millarini, and former footballer Kevin Kilbane. Also appearing here is TV personality Michael Barrymore, although a broken wrist suffered after the recording of this programme has ruled him out of the main show, and he is replaced by former Blue Peter host Radzi Chinyanganya. In this first edition, the celebrities are paired up with their professional partners, while Torvill and Dean also perform a spectacular routine with some special guests, before taking to the judges' desk alongside Ashley Banjo and newcomer John Barrowman(n)

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond sets out on a personal mission of vengeance as he pursues the secret criminal organisation Quantum. His search leads him to the head of an ecological corporation, who is plotting to orchestrate a coup in a Latin American country to get his hands on a precious natural resource. Spy thriller sequel, starring Daniel Craig, Olga Kurylenko, Judi Dench, Gemma Arterton and Mathieu Amalric(n)

programme.title: Ball & Boe: A Very Merry Christmas
programme.desc: After the huge success of their previous albums and sold-out tours, Michael Ball and Alfie Boe reunite for a festive night of music. Showcasing both their unique blend of extraordinary talent and infectious humour, the duo perform exciting new material alongside some Christmas favourites, as well as singing with special guests Shirley Bassey, Luke Evans and Gregory Porter(n)

Mystery, starring John Nettles, John Hopkins, Barry Jackson, James Weber Brown and Oliver Ford Davies(n)

programme.desc: Married explorers Rick and Evelyn battle the newly resurrected mummy Imhotep and his ruthless partner, who have captured their son. The undead creature is heading for a confrontation with a legendary ancient warrior - with power over a magical army to be won. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo, Oded Fehr and Patricia Velasquez, with a brief appearance by Dwayne Johnson(n)

programme.title: The Santa Clause (1994)
programme.desc: A grumpy divorced father faces a dilemma one Christmas Eve after accidentally startling Santa and causing him to fall to his death. The guilty man's only option is to put on the red suit, jump into the sleigh and finish the round himself, much to his son's delight. Fantasy comedy, starring Tim Allen, Judge Reinhold, Wendy Crewson, Eric Lloyd and David Krumholtz(n)

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking three contestants to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Anton Du Beke, Alistair McGowan, Sarah-Jane Crawford and Adrian Edmondson pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: As the locals prepare for Christmas Day, Leyla's hopes are raised, Rhona feels guilty about leaving, and Kim has a proposal for Marlon(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick and Sarah unveil the refurbished factory to the staff, keeping quiet about Derek's change of heart, while Sean reveals to an appalled Fiz that Jade is living on the streets. Rita tells Gemma she has arranged to visit Mavis over Christmas, despite the fact she has no plans to go anywhere. Emma and Seb become a couple, but will Alina ruin their romance?(n)

programme.title: Countrywise
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin finds out about the festive ingredients to be found in Cheshire's Delamere Forest, and Ben Fogle is at Castle Howard in North Yorkshire - one of the grand settings of ITV's Victoria - to help with the renovation of its gold dome. There is also one last visit to Yorkshire Dales shepherdess Amanda Owen as the farm prepares for winter and her children get ready for Christmas(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary lies to Maria that Derek ran into financial trouble, so he swooped in to save the factory and the workers' jobs. Later, he locks a tied-up Derek in the furniture shop overnight, determined to make sure he misses his flight to Florida with his kids. Fiz and Tyrone find Jade on Victoria Street and drag her back to No 9 and, while Rita decorates her tree alone, Emma informs Seb that Alina came looking for him(n)

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Gino D'Acampo and Fred Sirieix reconvene after their European travels to rediscover the spirit of Christmas, heading to the unlikely festive destination of Morocco to see what the North African country has to offer in the way of culture, cuisine and adventure. The trio journey through the Agafay desert by camel, on through the mountains and end up deep in Marrakesh's marketplace and souks, with their trip culminating in a festive feast inspired by their travels, the people they have met and the experiences they have had(n)

programme.title: Gremlins (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager is given a strange, cute creature as a Christmas present by his eccentric father and warned to keep it away from water, not to feed it after midnight, or expose it to direct light. However, a chance dousing causes the furball to spawn a horde of murderous little monsters, and their devilish antics bring mayhem to a small town. Comedy horror, with Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, Hoyt Axton and Polly Holliday(n)
